words.exampleEn: Please review the agenda before the meeting starts.
words.exampleZh: 請在會議開始前先看過議程。
words.exampleEn2: The first item on the agenda is the sales report.
words.exampleZh2: 議程的第一項是銷售報告。

words.exampleEn: The deadline for the report is next Friday.
words.exampleZh: 這份報告的截止期限是下週五。
words.exampleEn2: We worked late to meet the deadline.
words.exampleZh2: 我們為了趕上截止期限而加班到很晚。

words.exampleEn: The manager decided to postpone the meeting until Monday.
words.exampleZh: 經理決定將會議延到週一。
words.exampleEn2: The launch was postponed until further notice.
words.exampleZh2: 上市時間延後，另行通知。

words.exampleEn: Please find the attachment in my previous email.
words.exampleZh: 請查收我上一封電子郵件中的附件。
words.exampleEn2: I forgot to include the attachment in my email.
words.exampleZh2: 我忘了在郵件裡放附件。

words.exampleEn: This document is confidential and should not be shared.
words.exampleZh: 這份文件是機密的，不應外流。
words.exampleEn2: Keep all client data strictly confidential.
words.exampleZh2: 所有客戶資料都要嚴格保密。

words.exampleEn: A memo was sent to all staff about the new policy.
words.exampleZh: 一份關於新政策的備忘錄已發送給全體員工。
words.exampleEn2: Did you read the memo about the dress code?
words.exampleZh2: 你看過關於服裝規定的備忘錄了嗎？

words.exampleEn: My colleague helped me finish the presentation.
words.exampleZh: 我的同事幫我完成了簡報。
words.exampleEn2: She gets along well with all her colleagues.
words.exampleZh2: 她和所有同事都相處融洽。

words.exampleEn: Let's schedule a call for tomorrow afternoon.
words.exampleZh: 我們安排明天下午通話吧。
words.exampleEn2: The training is scheduled for next Wednesday.
words.exampleZh2: 訓練課程安排在下週三。

words.exampleEn: Please report any issues to your supervisor immediately.
words.exampleZh: 有任何問題請立即回報給你的主管。
words.exampleEn2: My supervisor approved my vacation request.
words.exampleZh2: 我的主管批准了我的休假申請。

words.exampleEn: She works in the accounting department.
words.exampleZh: 她在會計部門工作。
words.exampleEn2: Which department handles customer refunds?
words.exampleZh2: 哪個部門負責處理顧客退款？

words.exampleEn: I have an appointment with a client at three o'clock.
words.exampleZh: 我三點和一位客戶有約。
words.exampleEn2: I need to cancel my three o'clock appointment.
words.exampleZh2: 我需要取消三點的約會。

words.exampleEn: You can reach me at extension 214.
words.exampleZh: 你可以打分機 214 找到我。
words.exampleEn2: Ask for extension 105 when you call.
words.exampleZh2: 來電時請轉分機 105。

words.exampleEn: The photocopier on the second floor is out of order.
words.exampleZh: 二樓的影印機故障了。
words.exampleEn2: The photocopier can also scan documents.
words.exampleZh2: 這台影印機也能掃描文件。

words.exampleEn: Please order more stationery from the supply room.
words.exampleZh: 請向供應室訂購更多文具。
words.exampleEn2: We keep extra stationery in the cabinet.
words.exampleZh2: 我們把備用文具放在櫃子裡。

words.exampleEn: Her workload doubled after the merger.
words.exampleZh: 公司合併後，她的工作量增加了一倍。
words.exampleEn2: The team shared the workload evenly.
words.exampleZh2: 團隊平均分攤了工作量。

words.exampleEn: Employees who work overtime will receive extra pay.
words.exampleZh: 加班的員工會獲得額外薪資。
words.exampleEn2: He did two hours of overtime yesterday.
words.exampleZh2: 他昨天加班了兩小時。

words.exampleEn: Please follow the standard procedure when filing a report.
words.exampleZh: 提交報告時請遵循標準程序。
words.exampleEn2: What is the procedure for requesting leave?
words.exampleZh2: 請假的程序是什麼？

words.exampleEn: All forms must be submitted by the end of the day.
words.exampleZh: 所有表格必須在今天下班前提交。
words.exampleEn2: She submitted her expense report on time.
words.exampleZh2: 她準時提交了費用報告。

words.exampleEn: We will notify you of the results by email.
words.exampleZh: 我們會以電子郵件通知你結果。
words.exampleEn2: Please notify the manager of any changes.
words.exampleZh2: 如有任何變動，請通知經理。

words.exampleEn: His cubicle is right next to the copy room.
words.exampleZh: 他的隔間就在影印室旁邊。
words.exampleEn2: Each cubicle has its own desk lamp.
words.exampleZh2: 每個隔間都有自己的檯燈。

words.exampleEn: Each applicant must submit a resume and a cover letter.
words.exampleZh: 每位應徵者都必須繳交履歷與求職信。
words.exampleEn2: Over fifty applicants applied for the job.
words.exampleZh2: 有超過五十位應徵者申請這份工作。

words.exampleEn: She received a promotion after two years of hard work.
words.exampleZh: 她努力工作兩年後獲得升遷。
words.exampleEn2: The store is running a special promotion this week.
words.exampleZh2: 這家店本週正在舉辦特別促銷。

words.exampleEn: He decided to resign from his position last month.
words.exampleZh: 他上個月決定辭去職務。
words.exampleEn2: She resigned to start her own business.
words.exampleZh2: 她辭職去創業了。

words.exampleEn: The company offers excellent benefits, including health insurance.
words.exampleZh: 這家公司提供優渥的福利，包括健康保險。
words.exampleEn2: Paid vacation is one of the main benefits.
words.exampleZh2: 帶薪休假是主要福利之一。

words.exampleEn: She has all the qualifications required for the job.
words.exampleZh: 她具備這份工作所需的全部資格。
words.exampleEn2: A driver's license is a required qualification.
words.exampleZh2: 駕照是必備資格之一。

words.exampleEn: We plan to recruit five new engineers this quarter.
words.exampleZh: 我們計畫在本季招募五位新工程師。
words.exampleEn2: The firm recruits interns every summer.
words.exampleZh2: 這家公司每年夏天招募實習生。

words.exampleEn: Annual performance evaluations will begin next week.
words.exampleZh: 年度績效考核將於下週開始。
words.exampleEn2: Your evaluation will be based on teamwork and results.
words.exampleZh2: 你的考核將以團隊合作與績效為依據。

words.exampleEn: All new employees must attend the orientation session.
words.exampleZh: 所有新進員工都必須參加新人訓練。
words.exampleEn2: Orientation for new hires begins at nine.
words.exampleZh2: 新進人員訓練九點開始。

words.exampleEn: Please attach your resume to the application form.
words.exampleZh: 請將履歷附在申請表上。
words.exampleEn2: Keep your resume to one or two pages.
words.exampleZh2: 履歷請控制在一到兩頁。

words.exampleEn: She has a job interview on Thursday morning.
words.exampleZh: 她週四早上有一場工作面試。
words.exampleEn2: The interview lasted about forty minutes.
words.exampleZh2: 面試進行了大約四十分鐘。

words.exampleEn: The position offers a competitive salary.
words.exampleZh: 這個職位提供具競爭力的薪水。
words.exampleEn2: Salaries are reviewed once a year.
words.exampleZh2: 薪資每年檢討一次。

words.exampleEn: He is planning an early retirement next year.
words.exampleZh: 他計畫明年提早退休。
words.exampleEn2: The company holds a party for employees near retirement.
words.exampleZh2: 公司為即將退休的員工舉辦歡送會。

words.exampleEn: We interviewed six candidates for the manager position.
words.exampleZh: 我們為經理職位面試了六位人選。
words.exampleEn2: Both candidates have strong sales backgrounds.
words.exampleZh2: 兩位人選都有紮實的業務背景。

words.exampleEn: All personnel must wear ID badges inside the building.
words.exampleZh: 所有員工在大樓內都必須配戴識別證。
words.exampleEn2: Please contact personnel to update your address.
words.exampleZh2: 請聯絡人事部門更新你的地址。

words.exampleEn: Payroll is processed on the 25th of each month.
words.exampleZh: 薪資在每月二十五日進行發放作業。
words.exampleEn2: She works in payroll and handles salary questions.
words.exampleZh2: 她在薪資組工作，負責處理薪資問題。

words.exampleEn: He requested a transfer to the Taipei office.
words.exampleZh: 他申請調職到台北辦公室。
words.exampleEn2: He transferred to the marketing team last month.
words.exampleZh2: 他上個月調到行銷團隊。

words.exampleEn: There is a vacancy in the sales department.
words.exampleZh: 業務部門有一個職缺。
words.exampleEn2: The vacancy was filled within two weeks.
words.exampleZh2: 這個職缺在兩週內就補上了。

words.exampleEn: The company holds a training workshop every quarter.
words.exampleZh: 公司每季舉辦一次培訓研習會。
words.exampleEn2: The workshop on public speaking was very popular.
words.exampleZh2: 公開演說研習會非常受歡迎。

words.exampleEn: He was dismissed for repeatedly violating company policy.
words.exampleZh: 他因屢次違反公司規定而被解僱。
words.exampleEn2: The meeting was dismissed early due to the storm.
words.exampleZh2: 因為暴風雨，會議提早解散。

words.exampleEn: The bonus system provides an incentive to work harder.
words.exampleZh: 獎金制度提供了更努力工作的誘因。
words.exampleEn2: A cash incentive is offered for referrals.
words.exampleZh2: 推薦人才可獲得現金獎勵。

words.exampleEn: The travel agent sent us a detailed itinerary.
words.exampleZh: 旅行社寄給我們一份詳細的行程表。
words.exampleEn2: The itinerary includes two free afternoons.
words.exampleZh2: 行程表包含兩個自由活動的下午。

words.exampleEn: I made a reservation for two nights at the hotel.
words.exampleZh: 我在飯店預訂了兩晚的住宿。
words.exampleEn2: I'd like to change my reservation to Friday.
words.exampleZh2: 我想把預訂改到週五。

words.exampleEn: Please have your boarding pass ready at the gate.
words.exampleZh: 請在登機門備妥您的登機證。
words.exampleEn2: You can download your boarding pass to your phone.
words.exampleZh2: 你可以把登機證下載到手機。

words.exampleEn: The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
words.exampleZh: 班機因天候不佳而延誤。
words.exampleEn2: We apologize for the delay in your delivery.
words.exampleZh2: 很抱歉您的貨件延誤了。

words.exampleEn: The price includes accommodation and breakfast.
words.exampleZh: 這個價格包含住宿與早餐。
words.exampleEn2: The company arranged accommodation for the trainees.
words.exampleZh2: 公司為受訓人員安排了住宿。

words.exampleEn: We arrived at our destination after a long flight.
words.exampleZh: 經過長途飛行後，我們抵達了目的地。
words.exampleEn2: Paris is a popular destination for honeymooners.
words.exampleZh2: 巴黎是蜜月旅行的熱門目的地。

words.exampleEn: You can leave your luggage at the front desk.
words.exampleZh: 您可以將行李寄放在櫃檯。
words.exampleEn2: My luggage was five kilograms over the limit.
words.exampleZh2: 我的行李超重五公斤。

words.exampleEn: Please confirm your booking 24 hours in advance.
words.exampleZh: 請提前二十四小時確認您的訂位。
words.exampleEn2: Please confirm your attendance by Friday.
words.exampleZh2: 請於週五前確認出席。

words.exampleEn: The departure time has been changed to 9:40 a.m.
words.exampleZh: 出發時間已改為上午九點四十分。
words.exampleEn2: Check the departure board for your gate number.
words.exampleZh2: 請看出發看板確認你的登機門。

words.exampleEn: Upon arrival, please proceed to the immigration counter.
words.exampleZh: 抵達後，請前往入境審查櫃檯。
words.exampleEn2: The estimated arrival time is 6:45 p.m.
words.exampleZh2: 預計抵達時間是下午六點四十五分。

words.exampleEn: You must declare these items at customs.
words.exampleZh: 這些物品必須向海關申報。
words.exampleEn2: It took an hour to get through customs.
words.exampleZh2: 通過海關花了一個小時。

words.exampleEn: Make sure your passport is valid for at least six months.
words.exampleZh: 請確認您的護照效期至少還有六個月。
words.exampleEn2: I renewed my passport before the trip.
words.exampleZh2: 我在出發前更新了護照。

words.exampleEn: A round-trip ticket is cheaper than two one-way tickets.
words.exampleZh: 來回票比兩張單程票便宜。
words.exampleEn2: A round-trip fare costs about three hundred dollars.
words.exampleZh2: 來回票價大約三百美元。

words.exampleEn: Would you like a window seat or an aisle seat?
words.exampleZh: 您想要靠窗還是靠走道的座位？
words.exampleEn2: Please keep the aisle clear during the flight.
words.exampleZh2: 飛行期間請保持走道淨空。

words.exampleEn: You can exchange currency at the airport bank.
words.exampleZh: 您可以在機場銀行兌換貨幣。
words.exampleEn2: What's the local currency in Thailand?
words.exampleZh2: 泰國的當地貨幣是什麼？

words.exampleEn: She bought some souvenirs for her coworkers.
words.exampleZh: 她買了一些紀念品送給同事。
words.exampleEn2: This mug is a souvenir from my Kyoto trip.
words.exampleZh2: 這個馬克杯是我京都之旅的紀念品。

words.exampleEn: We spent the afternoon sightseeing in the old town.
words.exampleZh: 我們下午在舊城區觀光。
words.exampleEn2: The package includes a half-day sightseeing tour.
words.exampleZh2: 套裝行程包含半日觀光。

words.exampleEn: We have a three-hour layover in Tokyo.
words.exampleZh: 我們在東京有三小時的轉機停留。
words.exampleEn2: A short layover leaves little time for shopping.
words.exampleZh2: 轉機停留時間短，沒什麼時間購物。

words.exampleEn: Online check-in opens 48 hours before departure.
words.exampleZh: 線上報到於起飛前四十八小時開放。
words.exampleEn2: Hotel check-in starts at three in the afternoon.
words.exampleZh2: 飯店下午三點開始辦理入住。

words.exampleEn: A cancellation fee applies within 24 hours of the flight.
words.exampleZh: 起飛前二十四小時內取消需支付取消費。
words.exampleEn2: The cancellation policy is printed on your ticket.
words.exampleZh2: 取消規定印在你的票券上。

words.exampleEn: The supplier will send the invoice at the end of the month.
words.exampleZh: 供應商會在月底寄出請款單。
words.exampleEn2: Please pay the invoice within thirty days.
words.exampleZh2: 請在三十天內支付這張請款單。

words.exampleEn: Could you send us a quotation for 500 units?
words.exampleZh: 可以寄給我們五百件的報價單嗎？
words.exampleEn2: We compared quotations from three suppliers.
words.exampleZh2: 我們比較了三家供應商的報價單。

words.exampleEn: This laptop comes with a two-year warranty.
words.exampleZh: 這台筆電附有兩年保固。
words.exampleEn2: The warranty covers parts and labor.
words.exampleZh2: 保固涵蓋零件與工資。

words.exampleEn: We need to check the inventory before placing a new order.
words.exampleZh: 下新訂單前，我們需要先確認庫存。
words.exampleEn2: Our inventory is updated every night.
words.exampleZh2: 我們的庫存每晚更新。

words.exampleEn: We are looking for a more reliable supplier.
words.exampleZh: 我們正在尋找更可靠的供應商。
words.exampleEn2: The supplier offered a better payment plan.
words.exampleZh2: 供應商提出了更好的付款方案。

words.exampleEn: You can get a discount if you buy in bulk.
words.exampleZh: 如果大量購買，可以獲得折扣。
words.exampleEn2: Bulk orders ship directly from the factory.
words.exampleZh2: 大量訂單直接從工廠出貨。

words.exampleEn: Customers may request a refund within 30 days.
words.exampleZh: 顧客可以在三十天內申請退款。
words.exampleEn2: The refund was credited to my card in three days.
words.exampleZh2: 退款三天內就退回我的信用卡。

words.exampleEn: The shipment is expected to arrive on Thursday.
words.exampleZh: 這批貨預計週四抵達。
words.exampleEn2: The shipment was held up at the port.
words.exampleZh2: 這批貨在港口被耽擱了。

words.exampleEn: We placed an order for twenty office chairs.
words.exampleZh: 我們訂購了二十張辦公椅。
words.exampleEn2: Your order has been confirmed by email.
words.exampleZh2: 您的訂單已透過電子郵件確認。

words.exampleEn: Keep the receipt as proof of purchase.
words.exampleZh: 請保留收據作為購買證明。
words.exampleEn2: The purchase must be approved by finance first.
words.exampleZh2: 這筆採購必須先經財務部核准。

words.exampleEn: Members receive a ten percent discount on all items.
words.exampleZh: 會員購買所有商品可享九折優惠。
words.exampleEn2: The discount applies to online orders only.
words.exampleZh2: 此折扣僅適用於線上訂單。

words.exampleEn: The vendor delivered the goods ahead of schedule.
words.exampleZh: 供應商提前交付了貨物。
words.exampleEn2: We switched to a local vendor to cut costs.
words.exampleZh2: 我們改用本地供應商以降低成本。

words.exampleEn: The contractor gave us an estimate for the repairs.
words.exampleZh: 承包商給了我們一份維修估價單。
words.exampleEn2: Can you give me a rough estimate of the cost?
words.exampleZh2: 可以給我一個大概的成本估價嗎？

words.exampleEn: The new product catalog will be mailed to all customers.
words.exampleZh: 新產品型錄將寄給所有客戶。
words.exampleEn2: The fall catalog features over two hundred items.
words.exampleZh2: 秋季型錄收錄了兩百多件商品。

words.exampleEn: Defective items can be returned within seven days.
words.exampleZh: 瑕疵商品可在七天內退貨。
words.exampleEn2: The defective units were pulled from the shelves.
words.exampleZh2: 有瑕疵的商品已從貨架上撤下。

words.exampleEn: Can I exchange this shirt for a larger size?
words.exampleZh: 我可以把這件襯衫換成大一號的嗎？
words.exampleEn2: The store allows exchanges within fourteen days.
words.exampleZh2: 這家店允許十四天內換貨。

words.exampleEn: We buy directly from the factory at wholesale prices.
words.exampleZh: 我們直接以批發價向工廠進貨。
words.exampleEn2: They sell electronics at wholesale prices.
words.exampleZh2: 他們以批發價販售電子產品。

words.exampleEn: The retail price is nearly double the wholesale price.
words.exampleZh: 零售價幾乎是批發價的兩倍。
words.exampleEn2: Retail sales rose sharply before the holidays.
words.exampleZh2: 節日前零售銷售大幅上升。

words.exampleEn: A refund requires the original receipt.
words.exampleZh: 退款需要出示原始收據。
words.exampleEn2: I lost the receipt, so I can't return it.
words.exampleZh2: 我弄丟了收據，所以不能退貨。

words.exampleEn: That model is currently out of stock.
words.exampleZh: 那個型號目前缺貨。
words.exampleEn2: The blue model is back in stock now.
words.exampleZh2: 藍色款現在重新有貨了。

words.exampleEn: He gave an impressive presentation on the new project.
words.exampleZh: 他就新專案做了一場令人印象深刻的簡報。
words.exampleEn2: Her presentation convinced the board to invest.
words.exampleZh2: 她的簡報說服了董事會投資。

words.exampleEn: All participants will receive a copy of the slides.
words.exampleZh: 所有與會者都會拿到一份投影片。
words.exampleEn2: Each participant will get a copy of the report.
words.exampleZh2: 每位參加者都會拿到一份報告。

words.exampleEn: The annual sales conference will be held in Osaka.
words.exampleZh: 年度業務會議將在大阪舉行。
words.exampleEn2: The conference attracted experts from ten countries.
words.exampleZh2: 這場研討會吸引了來自十國的專家。

words.exampleEn: Could you take the minutes for today's meeting?
words.exampleZh: 你可以負責今天會議的紀錄嗎？
words.exampleEn2: The minutes were emailed to everyone afterward.
words.exampleZh2: 會議紀錄事後以電子郵件寄給所有人。

words.exampleEn: Please refer to page three of the handout.
words.exampleZh: 請參閱講義的第三頁。
words.exampleEn2: Extra handouts are available at the door.
words.exampleZh2: 門口備有額外的講義。

words.exampleEn: The projector in Room B is not working properly.
words.exampleZh: B 會議室的投影機運作不正常。
words.exampleEn2: Connect your laptop to the projector with this cable.
words.exampleZh2: 用這條線把筆電接上投影機。

words.exampleEn: She proposed a new plan to cut costs.
words.exampleZh: 她提議一項降低成本的新計畫。
words.exampleEn2: He proposed moving the deadline up a week.
words.exampleZh2: 他提議把期限提前一週。

words.exampleEn: The board made a unanimous decision to expand overseas.
words.exampleZh: 董事會一致決議向海外擴張。
words.exampleEn2: The vote to expand was unanimous.
words.exampleZh2: 擴張案的表決獲得一致通過。

words.exampleEn: The meeting was adjourned until Friday morning.
words.exampleZh: 會議延到週五上午再繼續。
words.exampleEn2: The chairperson adjourned the meeting at noon.
words.exampleZh2: 主席在中午宣布休會。

words.exampleEn: The chairperson opened the meeting with a brief summary.
words.exampleZh: 主席以簡短的摘要為會議開場。
words.exampleEn2: The chairperson called the meeting to order.
words.exampleZh2: 主席宣布會議開始。

words.exampleEn: Let's brainstorm some ideas for the ad campaign.
words.exampleZh: 我們來為廣告活動腦力激盪一些點子吧。
words.exampleEn2: We brainstormed twenty ideas in an hour.
words.exampleZh2: 我們一小時內腦力激盪出二十個點子。

words.exampleEn: Please send me a summary of the discussion.
words.exampleZh: 請把討論內容的摘要寄給我。
words.exampleEn2: Here is a one-page summary of the findings.
words.exampleZh2: 這是研究結果的一頁摘要。

words.exampleEn: Our main objective is to increase market share.
words.exampleZh: 我們的主要目標是提高市占率。
words.exampleEn2: Our objective is to cut costs by ten percent.
words.exampleZh2: 我們的目標是降低一成成本。

words.exampleEn: We welcome feedback on the new proposal.
words.exampleZh: 我們歡迎大家對新提案提出回饋意見。
words.exampleEn2: Customer feedback helped us improve the app.
words.exampleZh2: 顧客回饋幫助我們改善了應用程式。

words.exampleEn: Sorry to interrupt, but we are running out of time.
words.exampleZh: 抱歉打斷一下，我們時間快不夠了。
words.exampleEn2: Please don't interrupt while others are speaking.
words.exampleZh2: 別人發言時請不要打斷。

words.exampleEn: Could you clarify what you mean by that?
words.exampleZh: 你可以說明一下那是什麼意思嗎？
words.exampleEn2: Let me clarify the schedule one more time.
words.exampleZh2: 讓我再說明一次時程。

words.exampleEn: The team finally reached a consensus on the design.
words.exampleZh: 團隊終於就設計達成了共識。
words.exampleEn2: After a long debate, we reached a consensus.
words.exampleZh2: 經過長時間討論，我們達成了共識。

words.exampleEn: We need to reschedule the meeting to next Tuesday.
words.exampleZh: 我們需要把會議改到下週二。
words.exampleEn2: Can we reschedule the call to Thursday?
words.exampleZh2: 我們可以把通話改到週四嗎？

words.exampleEn: The CEO will deliver the keynote speech at the conference.
words.exampleZh: 執行長將在研討會上發表主題演講。
words.exampleEn2: The keynote will be streamed online.
words.exampleZh2: 主題演講將在線上直播。

words.exampleEn: Each attendee must register at the front desk.
words.exampleZh: 每位出席者都必須在櫃檯報到。
words.exampleEn2: Attendees should silence their phones.
words.exampleZh2: 與會者請將手機調成靜音。

words.exampleEn: The advertisement will appear in tomorrow's newspaper.
words.exampleZh: 這則廣告將刊登在明天的報紙上。
words.exampleEn2: The advertisement ran during the evening news.
words.exampleZh2: 這則廣告在晚間新聞時段播出。

words.exampleEn: The marketing campaign boosted sales by 20 percent.
words.exampleZh: 這次行銷活動使銷售額成長了兩成。
words.exampleEn2: The campaign targets first-time home buyers.
words.exampleZh2: 這波宣傳活動鎖定首購族。

words.exampleEn: You can find more details in our product brochure.
words.exampleZh: 您可以在我們的產品簡介中找到更多細節。
words.exampleEn2: Grab a brochure from the front desk.
words.exampleZh2: 請在櫃檯拿一份簡介手冊。

words.exampleEn: The company will launch its new smartphone in May.
words.exampleZh: 該公司將於五月推出新款智慧型手機。
words.exampleEn2: The product launch was delayed by a month.
words.exampleZh2: 產品上市延後了一個月。

words.exampleEn: We need a new strategy to attract younger customers.
words.exampleZh: 我們需要新策略來吸引年輕客群。
words.exampleEn2: Our pricing strategy needs a review.
words.exampleZh2: 我們的定價策略需要重新檢視。

words.exampleEn: Please take a few minutes to complete our customer survey.
words.exampleZh: 請花幾分鐘填寫我們的顧客問卷。
words.exampleEn2: The survey results will guide our next steps.
words.exampleZh2: 問卷結果將指引我們的下一步。

words.exampleEn: Our main competitor just lowered their prices.
words.exampleZh: 我們的主要競爭對手剛剛降價了。
words.exampleEn2: We studied our competitors' pricing carefully.
words.exampleZh2: 我們仔細研究了競爭對手的定價。

words.exampleEn: This product targets busy office workers.
words.exampleZh: 這項產品鎖定忙碌的上班族。
words.exampleEn2: Our target market is adults aged 25 to 40.
words.exampleZh2: 我們的目標市場是 25 到 40 歲的成人。

words.exampleEn: The brand is known for its high-quality leather goods.
words.exampleZh: 這個品牌以高品質皮件聞名。
words.exampleEn2: The brand launched a new logo this spring.
words.exampleZh2: 這個品牌今年春天推出了新標誌。

words.exampleEn: The event generated a lot of free publicity.
words.exampleZh: 這場活動帶來了大量免費宣傳。
words.exampleEn2: The scandal brought unwanted publicity.
words.exampleZh2: 這樁醜聞帶來了負面曝光。

words.exampleEn: Our company sponsors a local marathon every year.
words.exampleZh: 我們公司每年贊助一場地方馬拉松。
words.exampleEn2: Local businesses sponsored the school fair.
words.exampleZh2: 本地商家贊助了學校園遊會。

words.exampleEn: We will display our new products at the trade exhibition.
words.exampleZh: 我們將在商展中展示新產品。
words.exampleEn2: The exhibition runs through the end of May.
words.exampleZh2: 展覽持續到五月底。

words.exampleEn: The salesperson demonstrated how the machine works.
words.exampleZh: 銷售員示範了這台機器的操作方式。
words.exampleEn2: Let me demonstrate the new features.
words.exampleZh2: 讓我來示範新功能。

words.exampleEn: We are negotiating a better price with the supplier.
words.exampleZh: 我們正在和供應商協商更好的價格。
words.exampleEn2: They negotiated for weeks before signing.
words.exampleZh2: 他們協商了數週才簽約。

words.exampleEn: Both parties signed the contract yesterday.
words.exampleZh: 雙方昨天簽署了合約。
words.exampleEn2: Read the contract carefully before you sign.
words.exampleZh2: 簽名前請仔細閱讀合約。

words.exampleEn: She is meeting an important client this afternoon.
words.exampleZh: 她今天下午要和一位重要客戶會面。
words.exampleEn2: The client asked for a revised proposal.
words.exampleZh2: 客戶要求提供修改後的提案。

words.exampleEn: Sales staff earn a five percent commission on each sale.
words.exampleZh: 業務人員每筆銷售可獲得百分之五的佣金。
words.exampleEn2: She earns commission on top of her base salary.
words.exampleZh2: 她除了底薪還有佣金。

words.exampleEn: The firm plans to expand into the Southeast Asian market.
words.exampleZh: 這家公司計畫拓展東南亞市場。
words.exampleEn2: The chain expanded to twelve new cities.
words.exampleZh2: 這家連鎖店拓展到十二個新城市。

words.exampleEn: We identified several potential customers at the trade show.
words.exampleZh: 我們在商展上找到了幾位潛在客戶。
words.exampleEn2: The startup shows great potential for growth.
words.exampleZh2: 這家新創展現出很大的成長潛力。

words.exampleEn: The two companies reached an agreement on the merger.
words.exampleZh: 兩家公司就合併案達成了協議。
words.exampleEn2: The two sides finally signed the agreement.
words.exampleZh2: 雙方最終簽署了協議。

words.exampleEn: The project went over budget by ten percent.
words.exampleZh: 這個專案超出預算一成。
words.exampleEn2: We set aside a budget for staff training.
words.exampleZh2: 我們為員工訓練編列了預算。

words.exampleEn: Travel expenses will be covered by the company.
words.exampleZh: 差旅費用將由公司負擔。
words.exampleEn2: Keep all receipts for business expenses.
words.exampleZh2: 商務開支的收據請全部保留。

words.exampleEn: The company reported record profits this quarter.
words.exampleZh: 公司本季獲利創下新高。
words.exampleEn2: The store made a small profit in its first year.
words.exampleZh2: 這家店第一年就小有獲利。

words.exampleEn: Annual revenue grew by fifteen percent last year.
words.exampleZh: 去年年營收成長了百分之十五。
words.exampleEn2: Most of our revenue comes from online sales.
words.exampleZh2: 我們大部分的營收來自線上銷售。

words.exampleEn: The accounts are audited by an external firm every year.
words.exampleZh: 帳目每年由外部事務所進行審計。
words.exampleEn2: The audit found no serious problems.
words.exampleZh2: 這次稽核沒有發現重大問題。

words.exampleEn: The department is facing a budget deficit this year.
words.exampleZh: 該部門今年面臨預算赤字。
words.exampleEn2: The city plans to reduce its deficit next year.
words.exampleZh2: 市政府計畫明年縮減赤字。

words.exampleEn: The building is the company's most valuable asset.
words.exampleZh: 這棟大樓是公司最有價值的資產。
words.exampleEn2: Skilled employees are a company's greatest asset.
words.exampleZh2: 有能力的員工是公司最大的資產。

words.exampleEn: The new factory is a long-term investment.
words.exampleZh: 新工廠是一項長期投資。
words.exampleEn2: Her investment doubled in five years.
words.exampleZh2: 她的投資五年內翻了一倍。

words.exampleEn: All online transactions are protected by encryption.
words.exampleZh: 所有線上交易都受到加密保護。
words.exampleEn2: Each transaction appears on your monthly statement.
words.exampleZh2: 每筆交易都會列在你的月結單上。

words.exampleEn: Please check your monthly bank statement carefully.
words.exampleZh: 請仔細核對您的每月銀行對帳單。
words.exampleEn2: The statement shows a balance of $2,400.
words.exampleZh2: 對帳單顯示餘額為兩千四百美元。

words.exampleEn: A deposit of 20 percent is required to hold the room.
words.exampleZh: 保留房間需支付兩成訂金。
words.exampleEn2: We paid a deposit to hold the venue.
words.exampleZh2: 我們付了訂金保留場地。

words.exampleEn: You can withdraw cash at any ATM nearby.
words.exampleZh: 您可以在附近任何一台提款機提領現金。
words.exampleEn2: He withdrew two hundred dollars from the ATM.
words.exampleZh2: 他從提款機領了兩百美元。

words.exampleEn: You can pay for the sofa in twelve monthly installments.
words.exampleZh: 這張沙發可以分十二期按月付款。
words.exampleEn2: The first installment is due next month.
words.exampleZh2: 第一期款項下個月到期。

words.exampleEn: The company will reimburse you for the taxi fare.
words.exampleZh: 公司會核銷你的計程車費。
words.exampleEn2: Submit the form to get your meal costs reimbursed.
words.exampleZh2: 提交表單即可核銷餐費。

words.exampleEn: The fiscal year ends on March 31.
words.exampleZh: 會計年度於三月三十一日結束。
words.exampleEn2: The report covers the current fiscal year.
words.exampleZh2: 這份報告涵蓋本會計年度。

words.exampleEn: The sales forecast for next quarter looks promising.
words.exampleZh: 下一季的銷售預測看起來很樂觀。
words.exampleEn2: Analysts forecast steady growth next quarter.
words.exampleZh2: 分析師預測下季將穩定成長。

words.exampleEn: She has ten years of experience in accounting.
words.exampleZh: 她有十年的會計經驗。
words.exampleEn2: She transferred from sales to accounting.
words.exampleZh2: 她從業務部轉調到會計部。

words.exampleEn: The retailer went bankrupt after years of losses.
words.exampleZh: 這家零售商在連年虧損後破產了。
words.exampleEn2: The airline nearly went bankrupt during the crisis.
words.exampleZh2: 這家航空公司在危機期間差點破產。

words.exampleEn: The research project is funded by the government.
words.exampleZh: 這項研究計畫由政府資助。
words.exampleEn2: The city funds free classes for seniors.
words.exampleZh2: 市政府出資為長者開設免費課程。

words.exampleEn: The package includes full health insurance.
words.exampleZh: 這套方案包含完整的健康保險。
words.exampleEn2: Travel insurance covers lost luggage.
words.exampleZh2: 旅遊保險涵蓋行李遺失。

words.exampleEn: Please turn off all electronic devices during takeoff.
words.exampleZh: 起飛期間請關閉所有電子裝置。
words.exampleEn2: This device can run for ten hours on one charge.
words.exampleZh2: 這台裝置充一次電可用十小時。

words.exampleEn: The technician will install the new system on Friday.
words.exampleZh: 技術人員將於週五安裝新系統。
words.exampleEn2: It takes five minutes to install the app.
words.exampleZh2: 安裝這個應用程式只要五分鐘。

words.exampleEn: We need to upgrade our software to the latest version.
words.exampleZh: 我們需要把軟體升級到最新版本。
words.exampleEn2: The upgrade adds several security features.
words.exampleZh2: 這次升級新增了多項安全功能。

words.exampleEn: Change your password every three months for security.
words.exampleZh: 為了安全起見，請每三個月更換密碼。
words.exampleEn2: Never share your password with anyone.
words.exampleZh2: 絕不要把密碼告訴任何人。

words.exampleEn: The new accounting software saves us a lot of time.
words.exampleZh: 新的會計軟體為我們節省了大量時間。
words.exampleEn2: The software crashed twice this morning.
words.exampleZh2: 這套軟體今天早上當機兩次。

words.exampleEn: The office network will be down for maintenance tonight.
words.exampleZh: 辦公室網路今晚將停機維護。
words.exampleEn2: Guests can join the visitor network for free.
words.exampleZh2: 訪客可免費使用訪客網路。

words.exampleEn: The printer malfunctioned during the busy season.
words.exampleZh: 印表機在旺季期間故障了。
words.exampleEn2: Report any malfunction to the help desk.
words.exampleZh2: 任何故障請回報服務台。

words.exampleEn: Refer to the user manual before operating the machine.
words.exampleZh: 操作機器前請先參閱使用手冊。
words.exampleEn2: The answer is on page ten of the manual.
words.exampleZh2: 答案在手冊第十頁。

words.exampleEn: The elevator is closed for routine maintenance.
words.exampleZh: 電梯因例行保養而暫停使用。
words.exampleEn2: Regular maintenance keeps the machines running well.
words.exampleZh2: 定期保養能讓機器維持良好運轉。

words.exampleEn: Always keep a backup of important files.
words.exampleZh: 重要檔案務必保留備份。
words.exampleEn2: The system makes a backup every midnight.
words.exampleZh2: 系統每天午夜自動備份。

words.exampleEn: Customer information is stored in a secure database.
words.exampleZh: 顧客資料儲存在安全的資料庫中。
words.exampleEn2: The database holds ten years of sales records.
words.exampleZh2: 資料庫保存了十年的銷售紀錄。

words.exampleEn: This printer is compatible with most laptops.
words.exampleZh: 這台印表機與大多數筆電相容。
words.exampleEn2: Is this charger compatible with my phone?
words.exampleZh2: 這個充電器和我的手機相容嗎？

words.exampleEn: Your subscription will expire at the end of this month.
words.exampleZh: 您的訂閱將於本月底到期。
words.exampleEn2: I canceled my streaming subscription last month.
words.exampleZh2: 我上個月取消了串流訂閱。

words.exampleEn: The IT team helped me troubleshoot the connection problem.
words.exampleZh: 資訊部門協助我排除了連線問題。
words.exampleEn2: The guide shows how to troubleshoot common errors.
words.exampleZh2: 這份指南說明如何排除常見錯誤。

words.exampleEn: The email server will be updated over the weekend.
words.exampleZh: 電子郵件伺服器將於週末進行更新。
words.exampleEn2: The server went down for an hour last night.
words.exampleZh2: 伺服器昨晚停擺了一小時。

words.exampleEn: Download the application to track your orders.
words.exampleZh: 下載這個應用程式即可追蹤您的訂單。
words.exampleEn2: Fill out the online application before Friday.
words.exampleZh2: 請在週五前完成線上申請。

words.exampleEn: The building has 24-hour security cameras.
words.exampleZh: 這棟大樓設有二十四小時監視器。
words.exampleEn2: Security cameras cover every entrance.
words.exampleZh2: 監視器涵蓋每個出入口。

words.exampleEn: Please update the customer list before the meeting.
words.exampleZh: 請在會議前更新客戶名單。
words.exampleEn2: The app gets a security update every month.
words.exampleZh2: 這個應用程式每月都有安全更新。

words.exampleEn: All laboratory equipment must be checked monthly.
words.exampleZh: 所有實驗室設備每月都必須檢查。
words.exampleEn2: All gym equipment is cleaned daily.
words.exampleZh2: 所有健身器材每天清潔。

words.exampleEn: A technician will visit your office to fix the copier.
words.exampleZh: 技術人員會到您的辦公室修理影印機。
words.exampleEn2: A technician replaced the faulty cable.
words.exampleZh2: 技術人員更換了故障的線材。

words.exampleEn: The restaurant changes its menu every season.
words.exampleZh: 這家餐廳每季更換菜單。
words.exampleEn2: The lunch menu changes every day.
words.exampleZh2: 午餐菜單每天更換。

words.exampleEn: We ordered two appetizers to share.
words.exampleZh: 我們點了兩道開胃菜一起分享。
words.exampleEn2: The fried tofu appetizer is very popular.
words.exampleZh2: 炸豆腐開胃菜非常受歡迎。

words.exampleEn: The ticket includes a free beverage of your choice.
words.exampleZh: 門票包含一杯自選的免費飲料。
words.exampleEn2: Cold beverages are in the fridge by the door.
words.exampleZh2: 冷飲放在門邊的冰箱裡。

words.exampleEn: The hotel restaurant is famous for its French cuisine.
words.exampleZh: 這家飯店餐廳以法式料理聞名。
words.exampleEn2: The night market offers all kinds of local cuisine.
words.exampleZh2: 夜市有各式各樣的在地美食。

words.exampleEn: We use only fresh, local ingredients.
words.exampleZh: 我們只使用新鮮的在地食材。
words.exampleEn2: List all ingredients on the label.
words.exampleZh2: 所有成分都要標示在標籤上。

words.exampleEn: The awards banquet will be held in the grand ballroom.
words.exampleZh: 頒獎宴會將在大宴會廳舉行。
words.exampleEn2: The wedding banquet had twelve courses.
words.exampleZh2: 這場婚宴有十二道菜。

words.exampleEn: The hotel offers a breakfast buffet from 6 to 10 a.m.
words.exampleZh: 飯店於早上六點至十點提供自助式早餐。
words.exampleEn2: The buffet includes a dessert station.
words.exampleZh2: 自助餐設有甜點區。

words.exampleEn: We hired a catering service for the company party.
words.exampleZh: 我們為公司派對聘請了外燴服務。
words.exampleEn2: Catering for fifty people costs about $800.
words.exampleZh2: 五十人的外燴大約八百美元。

words.exampleEn: All guests receive a complimentary welcome drink.
words.exampleZh: 所有賓客都會獲得一杯免費迎賓飲料。
words.exampleEn2: Breakfast is complimentary for all guests.
words.exampleZh2: 所有房客均享免費早餐。

words.exampleEn: Vegetarian options are available upon request.
words.exampleZh: 如有需要，可提供素食選項。
words.exampleEn2: Two of our guests are vegetarian.
words.exampleZh2: 我們有兩位賓客吃素。

words.exampleEn: The chef shared his secret recipe with the magazine.
words.exampleZh: 主廚向雜誌分享了他的獨門食譜。
words.exampleEn2: This soup recipe has been in our family for years.
words.exampleZh2: 這道湯的食譜在我們家流傳多年。

words.exampleEn: A 10 percent gratuity is added to parties of six or more.
words.exampleZh: 六人以上用餐將加收一成小費。
words.exampleEn2: The gratuity is not included in the bill.
words.exampleZh2: 帳單不含小費。

words.exampleEn: Grilled salmon is the specialty of the house.
words.exampleZh: 烤鮭魚是本店的招牌菜。
words.exampleEn2: Beef noodle soup is the specialty here.
words.exampleZh2: 牛肉麵是這裡的招牌。

words.exampleEn: Would you like to see the dessert menu?
words.exampleZh: 您想看看甜點菜單嗎？
words.exampleEn2: Save room for dessert!
words.exampleZh2: 留點肚子吃甜點吧！

words.exampleEn: The ice cream comes in ten different flavors.
words.exampleZh: 這款冰淇淋有十種不同口味。
words.exampleEn2: Which flavor would you like, chocolate or vanilla?
words.exampleZh2: 你想要哪種口味，巧克力還是香草？

words.exampleEn: Outdoor seating is available on the terrace.
words.exampleZh: 露台上有戶外座位。
words.exampleEn2: Indoor seating is limited on weekends.
words.exampleZh2: 週末的室內座位有限。

words.exampleEn: The café offers takeout and delivery services.
words.exampleZh: 這家咖啡店提供外帶與外送服務。
words.exampleEn2: We ordered takeout and watched a movie.
words.exampleZh2: 我們叫了外帶，然後看電影。

words.exampleEn: The head chef trained in Italy for five years.
words.exampleZh: 行政主廚在義大利受訓五年。
words.exampleEn2: The chef came out to greet the guests.
words.exampleZh2: 主廚出來向賓客致意。

words.exampleEn: Coffee refills are free with any breakfast set.
words.exampleZh: 點任一早餐套餐即可免費續杯咖啡。
words.exampleEn2: Can I get a refill on my iced tea?
words.exampleZh2: 我的冰茶可以續杯嗎？

words.exampleEn: I'd like to reserve a table for four at seven o'clock.
words.exampleZh: 我想預訂七點四人的位子。
words.exampleEn2: We reserved the private room for the dinner.
words.exampleZh2: 我們為晚宴預訂了包廂。

words.exampleEn: The rent includes all utilities except internet.
words.exampleZh: 房租包含網路以外的所有水電瓦斯費。
words.exampleEn2: Utility bills are due on the tenth.
words.exampleZh2: 水電費帳單十日到期。

words.exampleEn: The landlord agreed to repair the air conditioner.
words.exampleZh: 房東同意修理冷氣。
words.exampleEn2: Our landlord lives on the first floor.
words.exampleZh2: 我們的房東住在一樓。

words.exampleEn: The lease expires at the end of August.
words.exampleZh: 租約在八月底到期。
words.exampleEn2: We signed a two-year lease on the office.
words.exampleZh2: 我們簽了兩年的辦公室租約。

words.exampleEn: Tenants must give one month's notice before moving out.
words.exampleZh: 房客搬離前必須提前一個月通知。
words.exampleEn2: The previous tenant left the place very clean.
words.exampleZh2: 前一位房客把房子留得很乾淨。

words.exampleEn: The library is closed for renovation until October.
words.exampleZh: 圖書館因翻修閉館至十月。
words.exampleEn2: The renovation took three months to finish.
words.exampleZh2: 翻修花了三個月完成。

words.exampleEn: The apartment comes with all major appliances.
words.exampleZh: 這間公寓附有所有主要家電。
words.exampleEn2: The kitchen comes with modern appliances.
words.exampleZh2: 廚房附有現代化家電。

words.exampleEn: There is a laundry room in the basement.
words.exampleZh: 地下室有一間洗衣房。
words.exampleEn2: I do my laundry every Sunday morning.
words.exampleZh2: 我每週日早上洗衣服。

words.exampleEn: Turn left at the next intersection.
words.exampleZh: 在下一個十字路口左轉。
words.exampleEn2: The accident happened at a busy intersection.
words.exampleZh2: 事故發生在繁忙的十字路口。

words.exampleEn: This street is closed to traffic for pedestrians only.
words.exampleZh: 這條街禁止車輛通行，僅供行人使用。
words.exampleEn2: Pedestrians should use the crosswalk.
words.exampleZh2: 行人應走行人穿越道。

words.exampleEn: Drivers should take a detour due to the road work.
words.exampleZh: 由於道路施工，駕駛人應繞道行駛。
words.exampleEn2: Follow the detour signs around the bridge.
words.exampleZh2: 請跟著繞道指示牌繞過大橋。

words.exampleEn: The new bridge is still under construction.
words.exampleZh: 新橋仍在施工中。
words.exampleEn2: Construction noise starts at eight every morning.
words.exampleZh2: 施工噪音每天早上八點開始。

words.exampleEn: Bus fares will increase by five percent next month.
words.exampleZh: 公車票價下個月將調漲百分之五。
words.exampleEn2: Seniors pay half fare on weekdays.
words.exampleZh2: 長者平日搭車半價。

words.exampleEn: She commutes to the city by train every day.
words.exampleZh: 她每天搭火車通勤到市區。
words.exampleEn2: My daily commute takes about forty minutes.
words.exampleZh2: 我每天通勤大約四十分鐘。

words.exampleEn: The pharmacy is open until nine in the evening.
words.exampleZh: 這家藥局營業到晚上九點。
words.exampleEn2: The pharmacy is right next to the clinic.
words.exampleZh2: 藥局就在診所隔壁。

words.exampleEn: This medicine is only available with a prescription.
words.exampleZh: 這種藥必須憑處方箋購買。
words.exampleEn2: Bring your prescription to any branch.
words.exampleZh2: 帶著處方箋到任何分店皆可領藥。

words.exampleEn: You should get a dental checkup twice a year.
words.exampleZh: 你應該每年做兩次牙齒檢查。
words.exampleEn2: The company pays for an annual checkup.
words.exampleZh2: 公司負擔每年一次的健康檢查。

words.exampleEn: Call your doctor if the symptoms continue.
words.exampleZh: 如果症狀持續，請聯絡你的醫師。
words.exampleEn2: Common symptoms include fever and coughing.
words.exampleZh2: 常見症狀包括發燒與咳嗽。

words.exampleEn: The gym facilities are free for hotel guests.
words.exampleZh: 健身房設施供飯店房客免費使用。
words.exampleEn2: The sports facility is open until ten.
words.exampleZh2: 運動設施開放到十點。

words.exampleEn: Admission to the museum is free on Mondays.
words.exampleZh: 博物館週一免費入場。
words.exampleEn2: Admission includes a free audio guide.
words.exampleZh2: 門票含免費語音導覽。

words.exampleEn: Your gym membership needs to be renewed this week.
words.exampleZh: 你的健身房會員資格本週需要續約。
words.exampleEn2: Membership comes with free parking.
words.exampleZh2: 會員資格附免費停車。

words.exampleEn: Freight charges will be added to your final invoice.
words.exampleZh: 貨運費將加計在您的最終請款單上。
words.exampleEn2: Freight costs rose because of fuel prices.
words.exampleZh2: 貨運成本因油價而上漲。

words.exampleEn: The ship carries cargo between Kaohsiung and Singapore.
words.exampleZh: 這艘船往返高雄與新加坡運送貨物。
words.exampleEn2: The cargo was loaded onto the ship overnight.
words.exampleZh2: 貨物連夜裝上了船。

words.exampleEn: The goods will be stored in our central warehouse.
words.exampleZh: 貨物將存放在我們的中央倉庫。
words.exampleEn2: The warehouse operates around the clock.
words.exampleZh2: 這座倉庫全天候運作。

words.exampleEn: The company opened a new distribution center in Taichung.
words.exampleZh: 公司在台中開設了新的配送中心。
words.exampleEn2: Distribution to stores takes two days.
words.exampleZh2: 配送到各門市需要兩天。

words.exampleEn: A courier will pick up the documents this afternoon.
words.exampleZh: 快遞員今天下午會來收件。
words.exampleEn2: The courier requires a signature on delivery.
words.exampleZh2: 快遞送達時需要簽收。

words.exampleEn: Your order was dispatched from our warehouse this morning.
words.exampleZh: 您的訂單今天早上已從倉庫出貨。
words.exampleEn2: Orders placed by noon are dispatched the same day.
words.exampleZh2: 中午前下單當日出貨。

words.exampleEn: Use the tracking number to check your package's location.
words.exampleZh: 使用追蹤編號即可查詢包裹位置。
words.exampleEn2: The tracking page updates every few hours.
words.exampleZh2: 追蹤頁面每幾小時更新一次。

words.exampleEn: The carrier is not responsible for delays caused by weather.
words.exampleZh: 運輸業者不對天候造成的延誤負責。
words.exampleEn2: Choose a carrier at checkout.
words.exampleZh2: 結帳時選擇配送業者。

words.exampleEn: The port handles thousands of containers every day.
words.exampleZh: 這座港口每天處理數千個貨櫃。
words.exampleEn2: Each container holds about 2,000 boxes.
words.exampleZh2: 每個貨櫃約可裝兩千箱。

words.exampleEn: We will expedite your order at no extra charge.
words.exampleZh: 我們將免費為您的訂單加速處理。
words.exampleEn2: We paid extra to expedite the customs process.
words.exampleZh2: 我們加價以加速通關流程。

words.exampleEn: The first consignment of parts arrived damaged.
words.exampleZh: 第一批託運的零件抵達時已受損。
words.exampleEn2: The consignment cleared customs this morning.
words.exampleZh2: 這批託運貨物今早通關了。

words.exampleEn: She manages the logistics for all overseas shipments.
words.exampleZh: 她負責所有海外貨件的物流管理。
words.exampleEn2: Good logistics keep delivery costs down.
words.exampleZh2: 良好的物流能壓低運送成本。

words.exampleEn: Only certified operators may drive the forklift.
words.exampleZh: 只有持證照的操作員才能駕駛堆高機。
words.exampleEn2: The forklift moved the pallets to the truck.
words.exampleZh2: 堆高機把棧板搬上卡車。

words.exampleEn: Stack the boxes neatly on the wooden pallets.
words.exampleZh: 請把箱子整齊地疊放在木棧板上。
words.exampleEn2: Wrap each pallet in plastic before shipping.
words.exampleZh2: 出貨前每個棧板都要用塑膠膜包好。

words.exampleEn: Two items were damaged in transit.
words.exampleZh: 有兩件商品在運送途中受損。
words.exampleEn2: Your package is currently in transit.
words.exampleZh2: 您的包裹目前正在運送中。

words.exampleEn: Mark the box as fragile before shipping.
words.exampleZh: 寄送前請在箱子上標示易碎。
words.exampleEn2: Fragile items need extra padding.
words.exampleZh2: 易碎物品需要額外的緩衝包材。

words.exampleEn: Shipping and handling fees are included in the price.
words.exampleZh: 價格已包含運費與處理費。
words.exampleEn2: Special handling is required for chemicals.
words.exampleZh2: 化學品需要特殊處理。

words.exampleEn: The driver took an alternate route to avoid traffic.
words.exampleZh: 司機改走替代路線以避開車潮。
words.exampleEn2: The delivery route avoids the downtown traffic.
words.exampleZh2: 送貨路線避開了市中心車潮。

words.exampleEn: Deliveries should be made at the loading dock in the rear.
words.exampleZh: 送貨請至後方的裝卸區。
words.exampleEn2: Trucks line up at the loading dock each morning.
words.exampleZh2: 卡車每天早上在裝卸區排隊。

words.exampleEn: We offer free delivery on orders over fifty dollars.
words.exampleZh: 訂單滿五十美元即享免費送貨。
words.exampleEn2: Same-day delivery is available in the city.
words.exampleZh2: 市區內提供當日送達服務。

words.exampleEn: The new assembly line doubled our production speed.
words.exampleZh: 新的裝配線使我們的生產速度加倍。
words.exampleEn2: Assembly of each unit takes twenty minutes.
words.exampleZh2: 每台機器的組裝需要二十分鐘。

words.exampleEn: The company is building a new plant in Vietnam.
words.exampleZh: 公司正在越南興建新工廠。
words.exampleEn2: The plant runs two shifts a day.
words.exampleZh2: 這座工廠一天排兩班。

words.exampleEn: Production will be suspended during the holiday week.
words.exampleZh: 生產作業將於連假週暫停。
words.exampleEn2: Production resumed after the holiday.
words.exampleZh2: 假期結束後生產恢復了。

words.exampleEn: Monthly output increased by twelve percent.
words.exampleZh: 月產量成長了百分之十二。
words.exampleEn2: Daily output reached a record high.
words.exampleZh2: 日產量創下新高。

words.exampleEn: The factory is operating at full capacity.
words.exampleZh: 工廠正以全產能運轉。
words.exampleEn2: The hall has a seating capacity of 300.
words.exampleZh2: 這個廳可容納三百個座位。

words.exampleEn: Several key components are imported from Germany.
words.exampleZh: 幾項關鍵零件是從德國進口的。
words.exampleEn2: One missing component delayed the whole line.
words.exampleZh2: 一個零件缺貨拖延了整條產線。

words.exampleEn: Rising raw material costs are affecting our margins.
words.exampleZh: 原物料成本上漲正影響我們的利潤。
words.exampleEn2: Raw materials are inspected on arrival.
words.exampleZh2: 原物料到貨時會先檢驗。

words.exampleEn: All machinery must be shut down before cleaning.
words.exampleZh: 清潔前必須關閉所有機械。
words.exampleEn2: Heavy machinery requires trained operators.
words.exampleZh2: 重型機械需要受過訓練的操作員。

words.exampleEn: Automation has reduced errors on the production line.
words.exampleZh: 自動化降低了生產線上的錯誤。
words.exampleEn2: Automation cut production time in half.
words.exampleZh2: 自動化讓生產時間減半。

words.exampleEn: Every unit passes through quality control before shipping.
words.exampleZh: 每件產品出貨前都會經過品質管制。
words.exampleEn2: Quality control rejected two percent of the batch.
words.exampleZh2: 品管淘汰了這批貨的百分之二。

words.exampleEn: The safety inspection is scheduled for next Monday.
words.exampleZh: 安全檢查訂於下週一進行。
words.exampleEn2: The inspection takes place every quarter.
words.exampleZh2: 檢驗每季進行一次。

words.exampleEn: The recall was caused by a defect in the battery.
words.exampleZh: 這次召回是因為電池有瑕疵。
words.exampleEn2: Customers reported a defect in the switch.
words.exampleZh2: 顧客回報開關有瑕疵。

words.exampleEn: The design team will present a prototype next month.
words.exampleZh: 設計團隊下個月將展示原型。
words.exampleEn2: The prototype passed all safety tests.
words.exampleZh2: 原型通過了所有安全測試。

words.exampleEn: The parts must meet the client's exact specifications.
words.exampleZh: 零件必須完全符合客戶的規格。
words.exampleEn2: Follow the specifications exactly.
words.exampleZh2: 請完全依照規格執行。

words.exampleEn: We streamlined the packaging process to save time.
words.exampleZh: 我們簡化了包裝流程以節省時間。
words.exampleEn2: We streamlined the approval process.
words.exampleZh2: 我們簡化了簽核流程。

words.exampleEn: The company manufactures auto parts for export.
words.exampleZh: 這家公司製造外銷用的汽車零件。
words.exampleEn2: These parts are manufactured locally.
words.exampleZh2: 這些零件是在本地製造的。

words.exampleEn: The plant employs a workforce of about 800 people.
words.exampleZh: 這座工廠僱用約八百名員工。
words.exampleEn2: The workforce grew by 200 this year.
words.exampleZh2: 今年員工人數增加了兩百人。

words.exampleEn: She works the night shift at the packaging plant.
words.exampleZh: 她在包裝廠上夜班。
words.exampleEn2: My shift starts at six in the morning.
words.exampleZh2: 我的班從早上六點開始。

words.exampleEn: Products move along the conveyor to the inspection area.
words.exampleZh: 產品沿著輸送帶移動到檢驗區。
words.exampleEn2: The conveyor stops automatically if jammed.
words.exampleZh2: 輸送帶卡住時會自動停止。

words.exampleEn: The cases are made of durable, waterproof material.
words.exampleZh: 這些箱子由耐用的防水材質製成。
words.exampleEn2: These boots are durable and waterproof.
words.exampleZh2: 這雙靴子耐用又防水。

words.exampleEn: The property includes a parking lot and a small garden.
words.exampleZh: 這筆房產包含一個停車場和小花園。
words.exampleEn2: Property values doubled in ten years.
words.exampleZh2: 房地產價值十年內翻了一倍。

words.exampleEn: Real estate prices in this area have risen sharply.
words.exampleZh: 這一帶的不動產價格大幅上漲。
words.exampleEn2: She works as a real estate agent downtown.
words.exampleZh2: 她在市中心當不動產仲介。

words.exampleEn: They took out a thirty-year mortgage on the house.
words.exampleZh: 他們為這棟房子辦了三十年期的房貸。
words.exampleEn2: Their mortgage payment is due monthly.
words.exampleZh2: 他們的房貸每月繳一次。

words.exampleEn: The architect presented three designs for the new office.
words.exampleZh: 建築師為新辦公室提出了三個設計方案。
words.exampleEn2: The architect suggested adding more windows.
words.exampleZh2: 建築師建議增加更多窗戶。

words.exampleEn: The contractor reviewed the blueprints before starting.
words.exampleZh: 承包商在開工前審閱了設計圖。
words.exampleEn2: The blueprint shows two emergency exits.
words.exampleZh2: 設計圖上有兩個緊急出口。

words.exampleEn: We hired a contractor to remodel the lobby.
words.exampleZh: 我們聘請承包商改裝大廳。
words.exampleEn2: The contractor finished the job ahead of schedule.
words.exampleZh2: 承包商提前完工了。

words.exampleEn: The hotel plans to remodel all guest rooms next year.
words.exampleZh: 飯店計畫明年改裝所有客房。
words.exampleEn2: They remodeled the kitchen last spring.
words.exampleZh2: 他們去年春天改裝了廚房。

words.exampleEn: Smoking is not allowed anywhere on the premises.
words.exampleZh: 場所內任何地方都禁止吸菸。
words.exampleEn2: Security patrols the premises at night.
words.exampleZh2: 保全人員夜間在場區巡邏。

words.exampleEn: The office on the fifth floor has been vacant for months.
words.exampleZh: 五樓的辦公室已空置數月。
words.exampleEn2: The unit has been vacant since March.
words.exampleZh2: 這個單位從三月起就空著。

words.exampleEn: The apartment comes fully furnished.
words.exampleZh: 這間公寓附有全套家具。
words.exampleEn2: A furnished room costs a bit more per month.
words.exampleZh2: 附家具的房間每月租金稍高。

words.exampleEn: The agent emailed us the floor plan of the unit.
words.exampleZh: 仲介把這個單位的平面圖寄給了我們。
words.exampleEn2: The floor plan shows three meeting rooms.
words.exampleZh2: 平面圖上有三間會議室。

words.exampleEn: The building's amenities include a gym and a rooftop garden.
words.exampleZh: 這棟大樓的設施包括健身房和屋頂花園。
words.exampleEn2: A rooftop pool is the building's best amenity.
words.exampleZh2: 頂樓泳池是這棟大樓最棒的設施。

words.exampleEn: The building contains both offices and private residences.
words.exampleZh: 這棟大樓包含辦公室與私人住宅。
words.exampleEn2: His official residence is in Taipei.
words.exampleZh2: 他的正式居所在台北。

words.exampleEn: This district is zoned for commercial use only.
words.exampleZh: 這個區域僅限商業用途。
words.exampleEn2: Commercial rent is higher near the station.
words.exampleZh2: 車站附近的商業租金較高。

words.exampleEn: The bank requires an appraisal before approving the loan.
words.exampleZh: 銀行核貸前需要先進行估價。
words.exampleEn2: The appraisal came in higher than expected.
words.exampleZh2: 估價結果比預期還高。

words.exampleEn: The hotel's occupancy rate reached ninety percent in July.
words.exampleZh: 飯店七月的住房率達到九成。
words.exampleEn2: Occupancy is limited to eighty people.
words.exampleZh2: 使用人數上限為八十人。

words.exampleEn: The new office is bright and spacious.
words.exampleZh: 新辦公室明亮又寬敞。
words.exampleEn2: The lobby feels bright and spacious.
words.exampleZh2: 大廳感覺明亮又寬敞。

words.exampleEn: Each unit comes with extra storage in the basement.
words.exampleZh: 每個單位在地下室都附有額外的儲藏空間。
words.exampleEn2: We rented extra storage for old files.
words.exampleZh2: 我們租了額外的儲藏空間放舊檔案。

words.exampleEn: The firm will relocate its headquarters to Taipei.
words.exampleZh: 這家公司將把總部搬遷到台北。
words.exampleEn2: The team will relocate to the new office in May.
words.exampleZh2: 團隊五月將搬到新辦公室。

words.exampleEn: The warehouse needs a better ventilation system.
words.exampleZh: 這座倉庫需要更好的通風系統。
words.exampleEn2: Good ventilation prevents mold in summer.
words.exampleZh2: 良好的通風能防止夏天發霉。

words.exampleEn: The company clinic offers free flu shots in October.
words.exampleZh: 公司診所十月提供免費流感疫苗接種。
words.exampleEn2: The clinic accepts walk-in patients.
words.exampleZh2: 這間診所接受現場掛號的病人。

words.exampleEn: Consult your physician before starting any new exercise.
words.exampleZh: 開始任何新運動前請先諮詢醫師。
words.exampleEn2: The physician reviewed my test results.
words.exampleZh2: 醫師檢視了我的檢查結果。

words.exampleEn: Patients should arrive fifteen minutes before their appointment.
words.exampleZh: 病患應在預約時間前十五分鐘抵達。
words.exampleEn2: The patient is resting comfortably.
words.exampleZh2: 病患正在安穩休息。

words.exampleEn: An early diagnosis makes treatment much easier.
words.exampleZh: 及早診斷能讓治療容易許多。
words.exampleEn2: The diagnosis was confirmed by a second doctor.
words.exampleZh2: 診斷結果由第二位醫師確認。

words.exampleEn: The new treatment has fewer side effects.
words.exampleZh: 新療法的副作用較少。
words.exampleEn2: Treatment usually lasts about six weeks.
words.exampleZh2: 療程通常持續約六週。

words.exampleEn: Take the medication twice a day after meals.
words.exampleZh: 這種藥每天飯後服用兩次。
words.exampleEn2: Store the medication away from sunlight.
words.exampleZh2: 藥物請避光保存。

words.exampleEn: Do not exceed the recommended dosage.
words.exampleZh: 請勿超過建議劑量。
words.exampleEn2: The dosage depends on the patient's weight.
words.exampleZh2: 劑量依病患體重而定。

words.exampleEn: The vaccine is available at all city health centers.
words.exampleZh: 所有市立衛生中心都可接種這種疫苗。
words.exampleEn2: Flu vaccines are free for employees.
words.exampleZh2: 員工可免費接種流感疫苗。

words.exampleEn: Please inform the staff of any food allergies.
words.exampleZh: 如有任何食物過敏，請告知工作人員。
words.exampleEn2: She has a mild allergy to peanuts.
words.exampleZh2: 她對花生有輕微過敏。

words.exampleEn: In case of emergency, call the number on the back of your card.
words.exampleZh: 遇緊急狀況時，請撥打卡片背面的電話。
words.exampleEn2: Use the stairs in an emergency.
words.exampleZh2: 緊急狀況時請走樓梯。

words.exampleEn: Visiting hours for the ward end at eight p.m.
words.exampleZh: 病房探視時間到晚上八點為止。
words.exampleEn2: He was moved to a private ward.
words.exampleZh2: 他被轉到單人病房。

words.exampleEn: He is recovering well after the knee surgery.
words.exampleZh: 他膝蓋手術後恢復良好。
words.exampleEn2: The surgery took about three hours.
words.exampleZh2: 手術進行了大約三小時。

words.exampleEn: The doctor expects a full recovery within six weeks.
words.exampleZh: 醫師預期六週內可完全康復。
words.exampleEn2: Rest is important for a quick recovery.
words.exampleZh2: 休息對快速康復很重要。

words.exampleEn: Physical therapy sessions are covered by the insurance plan.
words.exampleZh: 物理治療課程由保險方案給付。
words.exampleEn2: She attends therapy twice a week.
words.exampleZh2: 她每週接受兩次治療。

words.exampleEn: The cafeteria menu was redesigned with nutrition in mind.
words.exampleZh: 員工餐廳的菜單以營養為考量重新設計。
words.exampleEn2: Good nutrition boosts your energy.
words.exampleZh2: 良好的營養能提升活力。

words.exampleEn: Food handlers must follow strict hygiene rules.
words.exampleZh: 食品處理人員必須遵守嚴格的衛生規定。
words.exampleEn2: Wash your hands to maintain good hygiene.
words.exampleZh2: 勤洗手以維持良好衛生。

words.exampleEn: The company launched a wellness program for employees.
words.exampleZh: 公司為員工推出了健康促進計畫。
words.exampleEn2: The wellness center offers yoga at lunch.
words.exampleZh2: 健康中心在午休時段提供瑜伽課。

words.exampleEn: A first aid kit is located next to the break room.
words.exampleZh: 急救箱放在休息室旁邊。
words.exampleEn2: Every office should have a first aid kit.
words.exampleZh2: 每間辦公室都應備有急救箱。

words.exampleEn: An ambulance arrived within ten minutes of the call.
words.exampleZh: 救護車在通報後十分鐘內抵達。
words.exampleEn2: The ambulance took him to the nearest hospital.
words.exampleZh2: 救護車將他送往最近的醫院。

words.exampleEn: Regular exercise helps strengthen the immune system.
words.exampleZh: 規律運動有助於增強免疫系統。
words.exampleEn2: Sleep strengthens your immune system.
words.exampleZh2: 睡眠能增強免疫系統。

words.exampleEn: The factory reduced its carbon emissions by thirty percent.
words.exampleZh: 這座工廠將碳排放減少了三成。
words.exampleEn2: New cars must meet strict emission standards.
words.exampleZh2: 新車必須符合嚴格的排放標準。

words.exampleEn: Air pollution levels dropped after the new regulations.
words.exampleZh: 新法規實施後，空氣污染程度下降了。
words.exampleEn2: The river suffered years of industrial pollution.
words.exampleZh2: 這條河承受了多年的工業污染。

words.exampleEn: The city aims to use only renewable energy by 2040.
words.exampleZh: 該市目標在 2040 年前全面使用再生能源。
words.exampleEn2: Wind power is a growing renewable source.
words.exampleZh2: 風力是成長中的再生能源。

words.exampleEn: Solar panels were installed on the office roof.
words.exampleZh: 辦公室屋頂裝設了太陽能板。
words.exampleEn2: The solar farm powers 5,000 homes.
words.exampleZh2: 這座太陽能電廠供電給五千戶家庭。

words.exampleEn: Sustainability is now a core part of our business strategy.
words.exampleZh: 永續現在是我們商業策略的核心。
words.exampleEn2: The report grades each firm on sustainability.
words.exampleZh2: 這份報告依永續表現為各公司評分。

words.exampleEn: The hotel supports water conservation with low-flow showers.
words.exampleZh: 飯店以節水蓮蓬頭支持節約用水。
words.exampleEn2: Energy conservation starts with small habits.
words.exampleZh2: 節能從小習慣開始。

words.exampleEn: Please recycle paper and plastic in the marked bins.
words.exampleZh: 請將紙類與塑膠投入標示的回收桶。
words.exampleEn2: Most of our packaging can be recycled.
words.exampleZh2: 我們大部分的包裝都可回收。

words.exampleEn: Follow local rules for the disposal of old batteries.
words.exampleZh: 請依當地規定處理廢電池。
words.exampleEn2: Battery disposal bins are by the exit.
words.exampleZh2: 廢電池回收箱在出口旁。

words.exampleEn: Hazardous materials must be stored in a separate area.
words.exampleZh: 有害物質必須存放在獨立區域。
words.exampleEn2: Wear gloves when handling hazardous waste.
words.exampleZh2: 處理有害廢棄物時請戴手套。

words.exampleEn: The lab tests water samples for contamination.
words.exampleZh: 實驗室檢測水樣本是否受到污染。
words.exampleEn2: The spill caused soil contamination.
words.exampleZh2: 外洩事故造成土壤污染。

words.exampleEn: The wetland supports a rich ecosystem of birds and fish.
words.exampleZh: 這片濕地孕育了豐富的鳥類與魚類生態系統。
words.exampleEn2: Coral reefs support a fragile ecosystem.
words.exampleZh2: 珊瑚礁支撐著脆弱的生態系統。

words.exampleEn: Taking the train reduces your carbon footprint.
words.exampleZh: 搭火車可以減少你的碳足跡。
words.exampleEn2: The app calculates your carbon footprint.
words.exampleZh2: 這個應用程式能計算你的碳足跡。

words.exampleEn: The building uses energy-efficient lighting throughout.
words.exampleZh: 這棟大樓全面使用節能照明。
words.exampleEn2: Energy-efficient bulbs last much longer.
words.exampleZh2: 節能燈泡壽命長得多。

words.exampleEn: Less than half of the city's waste ends up in landfills.
words.exampleZh: 該市不到一半的垃圾最終進入掩埋場。
words.exampleEn2: The old landfill is now a public park.
words.exampleZh2: 舊掩埋場現在成了公園。

words.exampleEn: Food scraps from the cafeteria are turned into compost.
words.exampleZh: 員工餐廳的廚餘會被做成堆肥。
words.exampleEn2: We compost coffee grounds from the office.
words.exampleZh2: 我們把辦公室的咖啡渣拿去堆肥。

words.exampleEn: The region is facing its worst drought in decades.
words.exampleZh: 該地區正面臨數十年來最嚴重的乾旱。
words.exampleEn2: The drought lasted through the summer.
words.exampleZh2: 乾旱持續了整個夏天。

words.exampleEn: The restaurant passed the sanitation inspection.
words.exampleZh: 這家餐廳通過了衛生檢查。
words.exampleEn2: Poor sanitation can spread disease.
words.exampleZh2: 衛生條件不佳可能傳播疾病。

words.exampleEn: The fund helps preserve historic buildings downtown.
words.exampleZh: 這筆基金協助保護市中心的歷史建築。
words.exampleEn2: The trust works to preserve the old forest.
words.exampleZh2: 信託基金致力於保護這片老森林。

words.exampleEn: We switched to eco-friendly packaging last year.
words.exampleZh: 我們去年改用環保包裝。
words.exampleEn2: We offer eco-friendly cleaning products.
words.exampleZh2: 我們販售環保清潔用品。

words.exampleEn: The new highway was rerouted to protect local wildlife.
words.exampleZh: 新公路改道以保護當地野生動物。
words.exampleEn2: The park is home to rare wildlife.
words.exampleZh2: 這座公園是稀有野生動物的棲地。

words.exampleEn: New safety regulations take effect next quarter.
words.exampleZh: 新的安全法規將於下一季生效。
words.exampleEn2: The new regulation limits working hours.
words.exampleZh2: 新法規限制了工時。

words.exampleEn: The audit confirmed our compliance with tax laws.
words.exampleZh: 稽核確認我們符合稅法規定。
words.exampleEn2: Compliance training is held every year.
words.exampleZh2: 法遵訓練每年舉辦一次。

words.exampleEn: Please review the cancellation clause before signing.
words.exampleZh: 簽約前請詳閱取消條款。
words.exampleEn2: The clause allows early termination.
words.exampleZh2: 這條條款允許提前解約。

words.exampleEn: Both parties agreed to an amendment of the contract.
words.exampleZh: 雙方同意對合約進行修正。
words.exampleEn2: The amendment passed by a narrow vote.
words.exampleZh2: 修正案以些微票數通過。

words.exampleEn: The company denies any liability for the accident.
words.exampleZh: 公司否認對這起事故負有任何責任。
words.exampleEn2: Sign here to accept limited liability.
words.exampleZh2: 在此簽名即接受有限責任。

words.exampleEn: The images are protected by copyright.
words.exampleZh: 這些圖片受著作權保護。
words.exampleEn2: Copyright lasts for the author's lifetime plus 70 years.
words.exampleZh2: 著作權保護期為作者終身加七十年。

words.exampleEn: The company filed a patent for its new battery design.
words.exampleZh: 公司為新電池設計申請了專利。
words.exampleEn2: The patent expires in 2032.
words.exampleZh2: 這項專利於 2032 年到期。

words.exampleEn: The logo is a registered trademark.
words.exampleZh: 這個標誌是註冊商標。
words.exampleEn2: They sued over the misuse of their trademark.
words.exampleZh2: 他們因商標被濫用而提告。

words.exampleEn: The supplier filed a lawsuit over the unpaid invoices.
words.exampleZh: 供應商就未付款項提起訴訟。
words.exampleEn2: The lawsuit was settled out of court.
words.exampleZh2: 這起訴訟以庭外和解收場。

words.exampleEn: Our attorney will review the agreement this week.
words.exampleZh: 我們的律師本週會審閱這份協議。
words.exampleEn2: Speak to an attorney before signing.
words.exampleZh2: 簽署前請先諮詢律師。

words.exampleEn: Late delivery could be considered a breach of contract.
words.exampleZh: 延遲交貨可能構成違約。
words.exampleEn2: Any breach must be reported at once.
words.exampleZh2: 任何違約情事都必須立即通報。

words.exampleEn: Please read the terms and conditions carefully.
words.exampleZh: 請仔細閱讀條款與細則。
words.exampleEn2: The payment terms are thirty days.
words.exampleZh2: 付款條件為三十天。

words.exampleEn: All employees sign a confidentiality agreement.
words.exampleZh: 所有員工都要簽署保密協議。
words.exampleEn2: Confidentiality applies even after you leave the company.
words.exampleZh2: 保密義務在離職後仍然有效。

words.exampleEn: The dispute was settled through arbitration.
words.exampleZh: 這起糾紛透過仲裁解決了。
words.exampleEn2: Arbitration is faster than going to court.
words.exampleZh2: 仲裁比上法院快。

words.exampleEn: New legislation requires clearer food labeling.
words.exampleZh: 新法律要求食品標示更清楚。
words.exampleEn2: The legislation takes effect in January.
words.exampleZh2: 這項法律一月生效。

words.exampleEn: You need a permit to hold an event in the park.
words.exampleZh: 在公園舉辦活動需要許可證。
words.exampleEn2: Building permits take weeks to process.
words.exampleZh2: 建築許可要花數週審核。

words.exampleEn: Smoking is prohibited inside the terminal.
words.exampleZh: 航廈內禁止吸菸。
words.exampleEn2: The rules prohibit photography inside.
words.exampleZh2: 規定禁止在內部攝影。

words.exampleEn: The parking rules are strictly enforced on weekdays.
words.exampleZh: 平日嚴格執行停車規定。
words.exampleEn2: The new policy will be enforced from Monday.
words.exampleZh2: 新政策將從週一起執行。

words.exampleEn: The warranty is void if the seal is broken.
words.exampleZh: 若封條破損，保固即失效。
words.exampleEn2: The contract becomes void after 90 days.
words.exampleZh2: 合約九十天後即失效。

words.exampleEn: The signed agreement is legally binding.
words.exampleZh: 簽署後的協議具有法律約束力。
words.exampleEn2: A verbal promise is not always binding.
words.exampleZh2: 口頭承諾不一定具約束力。

words.exampleEn: Several journalists attended the product launch.
words.exampleZh: 多位記者出席了產品發表會。
words.exampleEn2: The journalist interviewed the mayor.
words.exampleZh2: 記者採訪了市長。

words.exampleEn: The editor asked for a shorter version of the article.
words.exampleZh: 編輯要求把文章改成較短的版本。
words.exampleEn2: The editor cut the article by half.
words.exampleZh2: 編輯把文章刪減了一半。

words.exampleEn: The report is scheduled for publication in May.
words.exampleZh: 這份報告預定於五月出版。
words.exampleEn2: The journal is a monthly publication.
words.exampleZh2: 這本期刊是月刊。

words.exampleEn: Please submit your manuscript by the end of the month.
words.exampleZh: 請於月底前繳交您的原稿。
words.exampleEn2: The manuscript needs one more revision.
words.exampleZh2: 這份原稿還需要再修改一次。

words.exampleEn: The magazine has a circulation of 200,000 copies.
words.exampleZh: 這本雜誌的發行量為二十萬份。
words.exampleEn2: Online readership passed print circulation.
words.exampleZh2: 線上讀者數超越了紙本發行量。

words.exampleEn: The merger made headlines in the business press.
words.exampleZh: 這樁合併案登上了商業媒體的頭條。
words.exampleEn2: The headline caught everyone's attention.
words.exampleZh2: 這個標題吸引了所有人的目光。

words.exampleEn: The company issued a press release about the recall.
words.exampleZh: 公司針對召回事件發布了新聞稿。
words.exampleEn2: The press release goes out at nine tomorrow.
words.exampleZh2: 新聞稿明早九點發布。

words.exampleEn: The interview will be broadcast on Friday evening.
words.exampleZh: 這段訪問將於週五晚間播出。
words.exampleEn2: The game will be broadcast in four languages.
words.exampleZh2: 這場比賽將以四種語言轉播。

words.exampleEn: The event received wide media coverage.
words.exampleZh: 這場活動獲得媒體廣泛報導。
words.exampleEn2: Media coverage of the launch was positive.
words.exampleZh2: 媒體對這次發表的報導很正面。

words.exampleEn: She wrote an article about remote work trends.
words.exampleZh: 她寫了一篇關於遠距工作趨勢的文章。
words.exampleEn2: Her article on remote work went viral.
words.exampleZh2: 她那篇遠距工作的文章爆紅。

words.exampleEn: The columnist writes about personal finance every week.
words.exampleZh: 這位專欄作家每週撰寫個人理財主題。
words.exampleEn2: The columnist replies to reader letters weekly.
words.exampleZh2: 專欄作家每週回覆讀者來信。

words.exampleEn: Please proofread the brochure before it goes to print.
words.exampleZh: 手冊付印前請先校對。
words.exampleEn2: Always proofread before you hit send.
words.exampleZh2: 按下送出前一定要先校對。

words.exampleEn: An excerpt from the book appeared in the newspaper.
words.exampleZh: 這本書的摘錄刊登在報紙上。
words.exampleEn2: The trailer shows a short excerpt from the film.
words.exampleZh2: 預告片播出了電影的一小段。

words.exampleEn: The library subscribes to over fifty periodicals.
words.exampleZh: 圖書館訂閱了五十多種期刊。
words.exampleEn2: Back issues of the periodical are online.
words.exampleZh2: 這本期刊的過期號可在線上取得。

words.exampleEn: The interview appears in the June issue of the magazine.
words.exampleZh: 這篇訪談刊登在雜誌六月號。
words.exampleEn2: This issue focuses on green energy.
words.exampleZh2: 本期聚焦綠色能源。

words.exampleEn: The publisher plans to release the book in ten languages.
words.exampleZh: 出版商計畫以十種語言發行這本書。
words.exampleEn2: The publisher signed three new authors.
words.exampleZh2: 出版社簽下了三位新作者。

words.exampleEn: Subscribe to our newsletter for monthly updates.
words.exampleZh: 訂閱我們的電子報即可收到每月最新消息。
words.exampleEn2: The newsletter goes out every Friday.
words.exampleZh2: 電子報每週五發送。

words.exampleEn: The magazine will feature our CEO in next month's issue.
words.exampleZh: 雜誌下期將專題報導我們的執行長。
words.exampleEn2: The gallery features young local artists.
words.exampleZh2: 這間藝廊主打本地年輕藝術家。

words.exampleEn: Old issues are available in the online archive.
words.exampleZh: 過期刊物可在線上檔案庫取得。
words.exampleEn2: Old photos are stored in the digital archive.
words.exampleZh2: 舊照片保存在數位檔案庫中。

words.exampleEn: Send me the first draft by Wednesday.
words.exampleZh: 請在週三前把初稿寄給我。
words.exampleEn2: I finished the first draft last night.
words.exampleZh2: 我昨晚完成了初稿。

words.exampleEn: The training curriculum covers both sales and service skills.
words.exampleZh: 訓練課程涵蓋銷售與服務技巧。
words.exampleEn2: The curriculum now includes coding classes.
words.exampleZh2: 課程現在包含程式設計。

words.exampleEn: Enrollment for the evening course closes on Friday.
words.exampleZh: 夜間課程的報名週五截止。
words.exampleEn2: Enrollment doubled after the fee cut.
words.exampleZh2: 學費調降後報名人數翻倍。

words.exampleEn: The company covers tuition for job-related courses.
words.exampleZh: 公司補助與工作相關課程的學費。
words.exampleEn2: Tuition is due at the start of each term.
words.exampleZh2: 學費於每學期初繳交。

words.exampleEn: She received a full scholarship to study abroad.
words.exampleZh: 她獲得全額獎學金出國留學。
words.exampleEn2: He applied for three scholarships.
words.exampleZh2: 他申請了三項獎學金。

words.exampleEn: The marketing seminar attracted over a hundred attendees.
words.exampleZh: 這場行銷研討會吸引了上百位出席者。
words.exampleEn2: The seminar ends with a Q&A session.
words.exampleZh2: 研討會以問答時間作結。

words.exampleEn: The lecture on data analysis starts at ten.
words.exampleZh: 資料分析講座十點開始。
words.exampleEn2: The lecture hall seats two hundred.
words.exampleZh2: 演講廳可容納兩百人。

words.exampleEn: The faculty meeting was moved to Thursday.
words.exampleZh: 教職員會議改到週四。
words.exampleEn2: The faculty voted to change the grading system.
words.exampleZh2: 教職員投票通過修改評分制度。

words.exampleEn: Participants receive a certificate upon completion.
words.exampleZh: 完成課程的學員將獲頒證書。
words.exampleEn2: Frame your certificate and hang it up!
words.exampleZh2: 把證書裱框掛起來吧！

words.exampleEn: A high school diploma is required for this position.
words.exampleZh: 這個職位需要高中文憑。
words.exampleEn2: She earned her diploma in night school.
words.exampleZh2: 她讀夜校取得了文憑。

words.exampleEn: The new semester begins in early September.
words.exampleZh: 新學期九月初開始。
words.exampleEn2: Final exams are at the end of the semester.
words.exampleZh2: 期末考在學期末舉行。

words.exampleEn: The syllabus lists all assignments and exam dates.
words.exampleZh: 課程大綱列出所有作業與考試日期。
words.exampleEn2: The syllabus is posted on the course page.
words.exampleZh2: 課程大綱公布在課程網頁上。

words.exampleEn: Submit the assignment through the online portal.
words.exampleZh: 請透過線上平台繳交作業。
words.exampleEn2: The assignment is worth twenty percent of your grade.
words.exampleZh2: 這份作業占成績的兩成。

words.exampleEn: First-year students usually live in the dormitory.
words.exampleZh: 一年級學生通常住在宿舍。
words.exampleEn2: The dormitory has a shared kitchen on each floor.
words.exampleZh2: 宿舍每層樓都有共用廚房。

words.exampleEn: The firm hires twenty graduates every year.
words.exampleZh: 這家公司每年招聘二十名畢業生。
words.exampleEn2: She graduated with honors last June.
words.exampleZh2: 她去年六月以優異成績畢業。

words.exampleEn: The instructor will demonstrate the software first.
words.exampleZh: 講師會先示範這套軟體的操作。
words.exampleEn2: Our instructor gives feedback within a day.
words.exampleZh2: 我們的講師一天內就會給回饋。

words.exampleEn: Attendance at the safety briefing is mandatory.
words.exampleZh: 安全簡報必須全員出席。
words.exampleEn2: Wearing a helmet is mandatory on site.
words.exampleZh2: 在工地戴安全帽是強制規定。

words.exampleEn: Students may choose two electives each semester.
words.exampleZh: 學生每學期可選兩門選修課。
words.exampleEn2: Photography is offered as an elective.
words.exampleZh2: 攝影列為選修課程。

words.exampleEn: Applicants must provide an official transcript.
words.exampleZh: 申請者必須提供正式成績單。
words.exampleEn2: Order an official transcript online.
words.exampleZh2: 可在線上申請正式成績單。

words.exampleEn: The award ceremony will be held in the auditorium.
words.exampleZh: 頒獎典禮將在禮堂舉行。
words.exampleEn2: The whole school gathered in the auditorium.
words.exampleZh2: 全校在禮堂集合。

words.exampleEn: Free tutoring is available at the learning center.
words.exampleZh: 學習中心提供免費課業輔導。
words.exampleEn2: He earns extra money by tutoring math.
words.exampleZh2: 他靠當數學家教賺外快。

words.exampleEn: Tonight's performance begins at seven thirty.
words.exampleZh: 今晚的表演七點半開始。
words.exampleEn2: The performance received rave reviews.
words.exampleZh2: 這場表演獲得極高評價。

words.exampleEn: The gallery is showing works by local photographers.
words.exampleZh: 畫廊正在展出本地攝影師的作品。
words.exampleEn2: The gallery is free on the first Sunday of each month.
words.exampleZh2: 藝廊每月第一個週日免費參觀。

words.exampleEn: Tickets are available at the box office or online.
words.exampleZh: 門票可在售票處或線上購買。
words.exampleEn2: The box office opens two hours before the show.
words.exampleZh2: 售票處在開演前兩小時開放。

words.exampleEn: The audience applauded for nearly five minutes.
words.exampleZh: 觀眾鼓掌了將近五分鐘。
words.exampleEn2: The audience filled every seat in the hall.
words.exampleZh2: 觀眾坐滿了整個表演廳。

words.exampleEn: The final rehearsal is scheduled for Thursday night.
words.exampleZh: 最後一次排練訂在週四晚上。
words.exampleEn2: We have one more rehearsal before opening night.
words.exampleZh2: 首演前我們還有一次排練。

words.exampleEn: The film's premiere attracted many celebrities.
words.exampleZh: 這部電影的首映吸引了許多名人。
words.exampleEn2: The premiere sold out within hours.
words.exampleZh2: 首映票在幾小時內售罄。

words.exampleEn: A bronze sculpture stands in front of the city hall.
words.exampleZh: 市政廳前矗立著一座銅雕。
words.exampleEn2: The sculpture was carved from a single stone.
words.exampleZh2: 這座雕塑由一整塊石頭雕成。

words.exampleEn: The museum acquired a rare portrait from the 18th century.
words.exampleZh: 博物館購藏了一幅罕見的十八世紀肖像畫。
words.exampleEn2: The portrait took the artist a year to finish.
words.exampleZh2: 這幅肖像畫家花了一年完成。

words.exampleEn: The city orchestra will perform in the park this weekend.
words.exampleZh: 市立管弦樂團本週末將在公園演出。
words.exampleEn2: The orchestra tuned up before the concert.
words.exampleZh2: 管弦樂團在演出前調音。

words.exampleEn: The historic theater was recently restored.
words.exampleZh: 這座歷史悠久的劇院最近整修完成。
words.exampleEn2: The theater seats eight hundred people.
words.exampleZh2: 這座劇院可容納八百人。

words.exampleEn: Refreshments are sold in the lobby during intermission.
words.exampleZh: 中場休息時大廳有販售點心飲料。
words.exampleEn2: The intermission lasts twenty minutes.
words.exampleZh2: 中場休息二十分鐘。

words.exampleEn: The singer received a warm round of applause.
words.exampleZh: 歌手獲得了熱烈的掌聲。
words.exampleEn2: The applause lasted long after the curtain fell.
words.exampleZh2: 落幕後掌聲久久不歇。

words.exampleEn: The playwright will answer questions after the show.
words.exampleZh: 演出結束後劇作家將回答提問。
words.exampleEn2: The playwright based the story on real events.
words.exampleZh2: 劇作家以真實事件為藍本寫成這個故事。

words.exampleEn: Critics are calling the novel a masterpiece.
words.exampleZh: 評論家稱這部小說為傑作。
words.exampleEn2: The gallery's newest masterpiece drew big crowds.
words.exampleZh2: 藝廊最新的傑作吸引了大批人潮。

words.exampleEn: The costumes were designed by an award-winning artist.
words.exampleZh: 這些戲服出自一位得獎藝術家之手。
words.exampleEn2: Each costume took weeks to sew by hand.
words.exampleZh2: 每套戲服都花了數週手工縫製。

words.exampleEn: The band returned to the stage for an encore.
words.exampleZh: 樂團重返舞台加演一曲。
words.exampleEn2: The singer walked onto the stage to loud cheers.
words.exampleZh2: 歌手在歡呼聲中走上舞台。

words.exampleEn: The concert was moved to a larger venue.
words.exampleZh: 演唱會移師到更大的場地舉行。
words.exampleEn2: The venue can host both concerts and conferences.
words.exampleZh2: 這個場地能舉辦演唱會也能辦會議。

words.exampleEn: The pianist played two encores for the crowd.
words.exampleZh: 鋼琴家為觀眾加演了兩首曲子。
words.exampleEn2: The crowd shouted for one more encore.
words.exampleZh2: 觀眾高喊再安可一次。

words.exampleEn: The curator will give a guided tour of the exhibit.
words.exampleZh: 策展人將親自導覽這次展覽。
words.exampleEn2: The curator explained the history of each piece.
words.exampleZh2: 策展人解說了每件作品的歷史。

words.exampleEn: The film festival runs for ten days in October.
words.exampleZh: 電影節於十月舉行，為期十天。
words.exampleEn2: The jazz festival happens every August.
words.exampleZh2: 爵士音樂節每年八月舉行。

words.exampleEn: The new policy will be implemented next month.
words.exampleZh: 新政策將於下個月實施。
words.exampleEn2: The changes will be implemented in phases.
words.exampleZh2: 這些變更將分階段實施。

words.exampleEn: More funds were allocated to the research team.
words.exampleZh: 更多資金被分配給研究團隊。
words.exampleEn2: Allocate at least an hour for questions.
words.exampleZh2: 請至少保留一小時的提問時間。

words.exampleEn: All vendors must comply with our safety standards.
words.exampleZh: 所有供應商都必須遵守我們的安全標準。
words.exampleEn2: Products must comply with local labeling laws.
words.exampleZh2: 產品必須符合當地標示法規。

words.exampleEn: The website is undergoing scheduled maintenance.
words.exampleZh: 網站正在進行例行維護。
words.exampleEn2: The bridge is undergoing repairs this month.
words.exampleZh2: 這座橋本月正在進行維修。

words.exampleEn: The new system facilitates communication between teams.
words.exampleZh: 新系統促進了團隊之間的溝通。
words.exampleEn2: An interpreter will facilitate the discussion.
words.exampleZh2: 口譯員將協助討論順利進行。

words.exampleEn: Ms. Grant oversees all overseas operations.
words.exampleZh: Grant 女士監督所有海外業務。
words.exampleEn2: She oversees a team of twelve designers.
words.exampleZh2: 她管理一個十二人的設計團隊。

words.exampleEn: Learn to delegate tasks to your team members.
words.exampleZh: 要學會把任務交辦給團隊成員。
words.exampleEn2: He delegated the scheduling to his assistant.
words.exampleZh2: 他把排程工作交辦給助理。

words.exampleEn: The two departments will be consolidated in June.
words.exampleZh: 這兩個部門將於六月整併。
words.exampleEn2: The bank consolidated its smaller branches.
words.exampleZh2: 銀行整併了較小的分行。

words.exampleEn: We anticipate strong demand for the new model.
words.exampleZh: 我們預期新機型會有強勁需求。
words.exampleEn2: We anticipate delays during the holiday rush.
words.exampleZh2: 我們預期假期高峰會有延誤。

words.exampleEn: The meeting room can accommodate up to forty people.
words.exampleZh: 這間會議室最多可容納四十人。
words.exampleEn2: The shuttle can accommodate two wheelchairs.
words.exampleZh2: 接駁車可容納兩台輪椅。

words.exampleEn: Please park only in designated areas.
words.exampleZh: 請只停放在指定區域。
words.exampleEn2: This lot is designated for visitors.
words.exampleZh2: 這個停車場指定供訪客使用。

words.exampleEn: I have enclosed a copy of the signed contract.
words.exampleZh: 隨函附上已簽署合約的副本。
words.exampleEn2: Please find the schedule enclosed.
words.exampleZh2: 附上時程表，敬請查收。

words.exampleEn: The bank agreed to waive the annual fee.
words.exampleZh: 銀行同意免除年費。
words.exampleEn2: The gym waived the joining fee this month.
words.exampleZh2: 健身房本月免收入會費。

words.exampleEn: The board will convene on the first Monday of May.
words.exampleZh: 董事會將於五月第一個週一召開。
words.exampleEn2: The committee convenes twice a year.
words.exampleZh2: 委員會每年召開兩次。

words.exampleEn: Only managers are authorized to approve refunds.
words.exampleZh: 只有經理有權批准退款。
words.exampleEn2: I authorized the payment this morning.
words.exampleZh2: 我今天早上批准了這筆付款。

words.exampleEn: Please verify your shipping address before checkout.
words.exampleZh: 結帳前請核對您的寄送地址。
words.exampleEn2: We verified the figures against the receipts.
words.exampleZh2: 我們把數字與收據核對過了。

words.exampleEn: We need to finalize the budget by Friday.
words.exampleZh: 我們必須在週五前把預算定案。
words.exampleEn2: The design was finalized after three revisions.
words.exampleZh2: 設計案改了三版後定案。

words.exampleEn: The two firms collaborated on the design project.
words.exampleZh: 兩家公司在這個設計案上合作。
words.exampleEn2: Our team collaborates closely with the factory.
words.exampleZh2: 我們團隊與工廠密切合作。

words.exampleEn: Either party may terminate the contract with 30 days' notice.
words.exampleZh: 任一方均可提前三十天通知終止合約。
words.exampleEn2: The service was terminated due to non-payment.
words.exampleZh2: 服務因未繳費而被終止。

words.exampleEn: Don't forget to renew your license before it expires.
words.exampleZh: 別忘了在執照到期前辦理更新。
words.exampleEn2: I renewed the domain for another year.
words.exampleZh2: 我把網域續約了一年。

words.exampleEn: The report gives a comprehensive overview of the market.
words.exampleZh: 這份報告對市場做了全面的概述。
words.exampleEn2: The guide offers comprehensive travel tips.
words.exampleZh2: 這本指南提供全面的旅遊建議。

words.exampleEn: Details will be announced in subsequent emails.
words.exampleZh: 細節將在後續的電子郵件中公布。
words.exampleEn2: Subsequent orders will ship faster.
words.exampleZh2: 後續的訂單出貨會更快。

words.exampleEn: We set a tentative date of June 10 for the launch.
words.exampleZh: 我們暫定六月十日為上市日期。
words.exampleEn2: The schedule is tentative and may change.
words.exampleZh2: 時程屬暫定，可能變動。

words.exampleEn: Preliminary results show a rise in customer satisfaction.
words.exampleZh: 初步結果顯示顧客滿意度上升。
words.exampleEn2: Preliminary talks went smoothly.
words.exampleZh2: 初步會談進行順利。

words.exampleEn: Full-time employees are eligible for the bonus.
words.exampleZh: 全職員工符合領取獎金的資格。
words.exampleEn2: Only members are eligible for the discount.
words.exampleZh2: 只有會員符合折扣資格。

words.exampleEn: The cafe is adjacent to the main lobby.
words.exampleZh: 咖啡廳緊鄰主大廳。
words.exampleEn2: Our office is adjacent to the train station.
words.exampleZh2: 我們辦公室緊鄰火車站。

words.exampleEn: Make sure there is sufficient time for questions.
words.exampleZh: 請確保留有足夠的提問時間。
words.exampleEn2: We have sufficient stock for the sale.
words.exampleZh2: 特賣的庫存已經足夠。

words.exampleEn: The company made a substantial investment in training.
words.exampleZh: 公司在培訓上投入了大量資金。
words.exampleEn2: The firm reported substantial gains.
words.exampleZh2: 這家公司公布了可觀的獲利。

words.exampleEn: A prominent economist will speak at the forum.
words.exampleZh: 一位知名經濟學家將在論壇上演講。
words.exampleEn2: The award went to a prominent researcher.
words.exampleZh2: 獎項頒給了一位知名研究員。

words.exampleEn: The award recognizes innovative product design.
words.exampleZh: 這個獎項表彰創新的產品設計。
words.exampleEn2: Their innovative design won first prize.
words.exampleZh2: 他們的創新設計贏得首獎。

words.exampleEn: This versatile tool can cut, drill, and polish.
words.exampleZh: 這個多功能工具可以切割、鑽孔和拋光。
words.exampleEn2: She is a versatile player who can sing and act.
words.exampleZh2: 她是能唱能演的多才藝人。

words.exampleEn: The firm signed a lucrative deal with an overseas partner.
words.exampleZh: 公司與海外夥伴簽下了一筆利潤豐厚的交易。
words.exampleEn2: Exporting proved to be a lucrative move.
words.exampleZh2: 外銷證明是一步賺錢的棋。

words.exampleEn: She is meticulous about checking every figure.
words.exampleZh: 她核對每個數字都一絲不苟。
words.exampleEn2: He kept meticulous records of every expense.
words.exampleZh2: 他一絲不苟地記錄每筆開銷。

words.exampleEn: Please be punctual for the client meeting.
words.exampleZh: 客戶會議請務必準時。
words.exampleEn2: She is always punctual for her shifts.
words.exampleZh2: 她上班總是準時。

words.exampleEn: Our staff is trained to be courteous at all times.
words.exampleZh: 我們的員工受過訓練，隨時保持禮貌。
words.exampleEn2: The staff were courteous and helpful.
words.exampleZh2: 工作人員有禮貌又樂於協助。

words.exampleEn: The manual contains outdated contact information.
words.exampleZh: 這份手冊裡的聯絡資訊已過時。
words.exampleEn2: Replace the outdated software immediately.
words.exampleZh2: 請立即更換過時的軟體。

words.exampleEn: The committee will decide whether the plan is feasible.
words.exampleZh: 委員會將評估這項計畫是否可行。
words.exampleEn2: Working from home is feasible for most roles.
