words.exampleZh2: 多數職位在家工作是可行的。

words.exampleEn: It is imperative that all data be backed up daily.
words.exampleZh: 所有資料每天備份是絕對必要的。
words.exampleEn2: It is imperative to act before the deadline.
words.exampleZh2: 在期限前行動是當務之急。

words.exampleEn: Remove any redundant steps from the workflow.
words.exampleZh: 請移除流程中任何多餘的步驟。
words.exampleEn2: Cut the redundant paragraph from the report.
words.exampleZh2: 把報告中多餘的段落刪掉。

words.exampleEn: The open house is for prospective buyers.
words.exampleZh: 這場賞屋會是為潛在買家舉辦的。
words.exampleEn2: Prospective students toured the campus.
words.exampleZh2: 準學生們參觀了校園。

words.exampleEn: The flight takes approximately three hours.
words.exampleZh: 航程大約三小時。
words.exampleEn2: The repair will cost approximately $200.
words.exampleZh2: 維修費大約兩百美元。

words.exampleEn: Please read the contract thoroughly before signing.
words.exampleZh: 簽名前請徹底閱讀合約。
words.exampleEn2: Clean the machine thoroughly after each use.
words.exampleZh2: 每次使用後請徹底清潔機器。

words.exampleEn: The meeting will begin promptly at nine.
words.exampleZh: 會議將於九點準時開始。
words.exampleEn2: She replied promptly to every inquiry.
words.exampleZh2: 她迅速回覆每一則詢問。

words.exampleEn: The position is currently open to internal applicants.
words.exampleZh: 這個職位目前開放內部員工申請。
words.exampleEn2: We are currently hiring for two roles.
words.exampleZh2: 我們目前正在招聘兩個職位。

words.exampleEn: She previously worked at a consulting firm.
words.exampleZh: 她先前在一家顧問公司工作。
words.exampleEn2: The building was previously a warehouse.
words.exampleZh2: 這棟建築以前是倉庫。

words.exampleEn: Sales have grown for five quarters consecutively.
words.exampleZh: 銷售額已連續五季成長。
words.exampleEn2: It rained for five days consecutively.
words.exampleZh2: 雨連續下了五天。

words.exampleEn: Shipping costs have risen considerably this year.
words.exampleZh: 今年運費大幅上漲。
words.exampleEn2: Prices vary considerably between brands.
words.exampleZh2: 各品牌價格差異相當大。

words.exampleEn: The service is temporarily unavailable.
words.exampleZh: 服務暫時無法使用。
words.exampleEn2: The lobby is temporarily closed for cleaning.
words.exampleZh2: 大廳因清潔暫時關閉。

words.exampleEn: The downtown branch will close permanently in July.
words.exampleZh: 市中心分店將於七月永久歇業。
words.exampleEn2: The file was deleted permanently.
words.exampleZh2: 這個檔案已被永久刪除。

words.exampleEn: We occasionally offer weekend workshops.
words.exampleZh: 我們偶爾會舉辦週末工作坊。
words.exampleEn2: We occasionally work weekends in peak season.
words.exampleZh2: 旺季時我們偶爾週末上班。

words.exampleEn: Check the website frequently for updates.
words.exampleZh: 請經常查看網站以獲得最新消息。
words.exampleEn2: Trains run frequently during rush hour.
words.exampleZh2: 尖峰時段列車班次頻繁。

words.exampleEn: A representative will be with you shortly.
words.exampleZh: 客服人員很快就會為您服務。
words.exampleEn2: The results will be announced shortly.
words.exampleZh2: 結果即將公布。

words.exampleEn: Prices have changed; please update the menu accordingly.
words.exampleZh: 價格已調整，請相應更新菜單。
words.exampleEn2: The rules changed, and we updated the form accordingly.
words.exampleZh2: 規則改了，我們也相應更新了表格。

words.exampleEn: The tickets cost $20 and $35 respectively.
words.exampleZh: 門票分別為二十美元與三十五美元。
words.exampleEn2: The winners were from Japan and Brazil, respectively.
words.exampleZh2: 優勝者分別來自日本與巴西。

words.exampleEn: Alternatively, you may submit the form by mail.
words.exampleZh: 或者，您也可以郵寄方式繳交表格。
words.exampleEn2: Alternatively, you can pay at the counter.
words.exampleZh2: 或者，您也可以在櫃檯付款。

words.exampleEn: The contract is reviewed annually.
words.exampleZh: 這份合約每年審視一次。
words.exampleEn2: The festival is held annually in October.
words.exampleZh2: 這個節慶每年十月舉行。

words.exampleEn: We reached a mutually beneficial agreement.
words.exampleZh: 我們達成了互惠的協議。
words.exampleEn2: The deal was mutually beneficial.
words.exampleZh2: 這筆交易對雙方都有利。

words.exampleEn: The package was presumably delivered to the wrong address.
words.exampleZh: 包裹據推測被送到了錯誤的地址。
words.exampleEn2: The flight is presumably delayed by the weather.
words.exampleZh2: 班機推測是因天候而延誤。

words.exampleEn: The parts are readily available from local suppliers.
words.exampleZh: 這些零件很容易向本地供應商取得。
words.exampleEn2: Spare parts are readily available online.
words.exampleZh2: 備用零件在網路上很容易買到。

words.exampleEn: Deliveries are seldom late during the off-season.
words.exampleZh: 淡季期間送貨很少延遲。
words.exampleEn2: He seldom takes a day off.
words.exampleZh2: 他很少請假。

words.exampleEn: Please book the meeting room at least a day in advance.
words.exampleZh: 請至少提前一天預訂會議室。
words.exampleEn2: Thank you for letting us know in advance.
words.exampleZh2: 謝謝你事先告知我們。

words.exampleEn: On behalf of the team, I'd like to thank you all.
words.exampleZh: 我謹代表團隊感謝各位。
words.exampleEn2: She accepted the award on behalf of the team.
words.exampleZh2: 她代表團隊領獎。

words.exampleEn: I'm writing with regard to your recent inquiry.
words.exampleZh: 我來信是關於您日前的詢問。
words.exampleEn2: With regard to pricing, nothing has changed.
words.exampleZh2: 關於價格，目前沒有變動。

words.exampleEn: As of July 1, the new rates will apply.
words.exampleZh: 自七月一日起，將適用新費率。
words.exampleEn2: As of today, the office opens at eight.
words.exampleZh2: 自今日起，辦公室八點開門。

words.exampleEn: Refunds are processed in accordance with our policy.
words.exampleZh: 退款將依照我們的政策處理。
words.exampleEn2: Waste is sorted in accordance with city rules.
words.exampleZh2: 垃圾依市政規定分類。

words.exampleEn: The construction project is right on schedule.
words.exampleZh: 這項工程進度完全如期。
words.exampleEn2: The project remains on schedule.
words.exampleZh2: 專案進度仍然如期。

words.exampleEn: The elevator is out of order; please use the stairs.
words.exampleZh: 電梯故障，請走樓梯。
words.exampleEn2: The vending machine is out of order again.
words.exampleZh2: 販賣機又故障了。

words.exampleEn: Is this jacket still in stock in a medium size?
words.exampleZh: 這件外套 M 號還有庫存嗎？
words.exampleEn2: All sizes are currently in stock.
words.exampleZh2: 所有尺寸目前都有貨。

words.exampleEn: All prices are subject to change without notice.
words.exampleZh: 所有價格如有變動，恕不另行通知。
words.exampleEn2: Delivery dates are subject to weather conditions.
words.exampleZh2: 送達日期視天候狀況而定。

words.exampleEn: Delivery is free of charge for members.
words.exampleZh: 會員享免費送貨服務。
words.exampleEn2: Alterations are free of charge for members.
words.exampleZh2: 會員修改衣服免費。

words.exampleEn: You must sign the documents in person.
words.exampleZh: 文件必須由您親自簽署。
words.exampleEn2: You must pick up the badge in person.
words.exampleZh2: 識別證必須親自領取。

words.exampleEn: A security guard is on duty around the clock.
words.exampleZh: 警衛全天候值班。
words.exampleEn2: Two nurses are on duty overnight.
words.exampleZh2: 夜間有兩位護理師值班。

words.exampleEn: Our support team works around the clock.
words.exampleZh: 我們的客服團隊全天候服務。
words.exampleEn2: The support line operates around the clock.
words.exampleZh2: 客服專線全天候服務。

words.exampleEn: To date, we have received over 500 applications.
words.exampleZh: 至今我們已收到超過五百份申請。
words.exampleEn2: To date, no complaints have been received.
words.exampleZh2: 至今尚未收到任何投訴。

words.exampleEn: Thank you for coming on such short notice.
words.exampleZh: 感謝你在臨時通知下趕來。
words.exampleEn2: She prepared the slides on short notice.
words.exampleZh2: 她在臨時通知下趕出了投影片。

words.exampleEn: Reply by Thursday at the latest.
words.exampleZh: 最遲請於週四前回覆。
words.exampleEn2: Arrive by 8:40 at the latest.
words.exampleZh2: 最遲請於八點四十分前抵達。

words.exampleEn: The office will close in observance of the national holiday.
words.exampleZh: 辦公室將因國定假日休息。
words.exampleEn2: Parking is free in observance of the holiday.
words.exampleZh2: 為配合假日，停車免費。

words.exampleEn: Seats are available on a first-come, first-served basis.
words.exampleZh: 座位採先到先得制。
words.exampleEn2: Samples are first-come, first-served.
words.exampleZh2: 試用品先到先得。

words.exampleEn: Receipts are available upon request.
words.exampleZh: 如有需要，可索取收據。
words.exampleEn2: Vegetarian meals are available upon request.
words.exampleZh2: 素食餐點可應要求提供。

words.exampleEn: The renovation is two weeks behind schedule.
words.exampleZh: 整修工程進度落後兩週。
words.exampleEn2: The project fell two months behind schedule.
words.exampleZh2: 專案進度落後了兩個月。

words.exampleEn: We respond to all inquiries within 24 hours.
words.exampleZh: 我們會在二十四小時內回覆所有詢問。
words.exampleEn2: We received many inquiries about the new plan.
words.exampleZh2: 我們收到許多關於新方案的詢問。

words.exampleEn: The manager handled the complaint professionally.
words.exampleZh: 經理專業地處理了這起投訴。
words.exampleEn2: File a complaint through the online form.
words.exampleZh2: 請透過線上表單提出投訴。

words.exampleEn: Affected customers will receive compensation.
words.exampleZh: 受影響的顧客將獲得補償。
words.exampleEn2: Passengers received meal vouchers as compensation.
words.exampleZh2: 乘客獲得餐券作為補償。

words.exampleEn: Please accept our sincere apology for the delay.
words.exampleZh: 對於延誤，請接受我們誠摯的歉意。
words.exampleEn2: The airline issued a public apology.
words.exampleZh2: 航空公司公開道歉。

words.exampleEn: Customer satisfaction is our top priority.
words.exampleZh: 顧客滿意是我們的首要任務。
words.exampleEn2: The survey measures customer satisfaction.
words.exampleZh2: 這份問卷用來衡量顧客滿意度。

words.exampleEn: The mattress comes with a ten-year guarantee.
words.exampleZh: 這張床墊附有十年保證。
words.exampleEn2: We guarantee delivery within three days.
words.exampleZh2: 我們保證三天內送達。

words.exampleEn: You will receive a follow-up call within three days.
words.exampleZh: 三天內您會接到後續追蹤電話。
words.exampleEn2: A follow-up email confirmed the booking.
words.exampleZh2: 後續的確認信確認了預訂。

words.exampleEn: Call our 24-hour hotline for technical support.
words.exampleZh: 技術支援請撥打我們的二十四小時專線。
words.exampleEn2: The hotline is busiest on Monday mornings.
words.exampleZh2: 服務專線週一早上最忙。

words.exampleEn: A customer service representative will assist you shortly.
words.exampleZh: 客服代表很快就會為您服務。
words.exampleEn2: A representative will call you back today.
words.exampleZh2: 客服代表今天會回電給您。

words.exampleEn: A courtesy shuttle runs between the hotel and the airport.
words.exampleZh: 飯店與機場之間有免費接駁車。
words.exampleEn2: The dealer provides a courtesy car during repairs.
words.exampleZh2: 維修期間車商提供代步車。

words.exampleEn: The billing issue was resolved within a day.
words.exampleZh: 帳單問題在一天內就解決了。
words.exampleEn2: Most issues are resolved on the first call.
words.exampleZh2: 多數問題在第一通電話就能解決。

words.exampleEn: Unresolved cases are escalated to a supervisor.
words.exampleZh: 未解決的案件會升級交由主管處理。
words.exampleEn2: The case was escalated to the head office.
words.exampleZh2: 這個案件被上呈到總公司處理。

words.exampleEn: Thank you for your continued patronage.
words.exampleZh: 感謝您長期以來的惠顧。
words.exampleEn2: We value your patronage over the years.
words.exampleZh2: 我們珍惜您多年來的惠顧。

words.exampleEn: Join our loyalty program to earn points on every purchase.
words.exampleZh: 加入會員集點計畫，每次消費都能累積點數。
words.exampleEn2: Loyalty points never expire.
words.exampleZh2: 會員點數永不過期。

words.exampleEn: A replacement will be shipped at no cost.
words.exampleZh: 更換品將免費寄出。
words.exampleEn2: A replacement part arrived two days later.
words.exampleZh2: 更換的零件兩天後送到了。

words.exampleEn: Return the faulty charger for a full refund.
words.exampleZh: 退回瑕疵充電器即可獲得全額退款。
words.exampleEn2: The faulty batch was recalled last week.
words.exampleZh2: 瑕疵批次上週已回收。

words.exampleEn: For assistance, press zero to speak to an operator.
words.exampleZh: 如需協助，請按零由專人為您服務。
words.exampleEn2: Thank you for your assistance today.
words.exampleZh2: 感謝您今天的協助。

words.exampleEn: The brand is known for excellent after-sales service.
words.exampleZh: 這個品牌以優異的售後服務聞名。
words.exampleEn2: After-sales support is available by chat.
words.exampleZh2: 售後支援可透過線上聊天取得。

words.exampleEn: As a gesture of goodwill, we've added a $20 credit to your account.
words.exampleZh: 作為善意的表示，我們已在您的帳戶加值二十美元。
words.exampleEn2: The gesture earned the brand much goodwill.
words.exampleZh2: 這個舉動為品牌贏得許多好感。

words.exampleEn: You can file a claim for the damaged item online.
words.exampleZh: 您可以在線上為受損商品提出索賠。
words.exampleEn2: Submit your claim within seven days.
words.exampleZh2: 請在七天內提出索賠。

words.exampleEn: Registration opens at eight in the main hall.
words.exampleZh: 報名於八點在大廳開始。
words.exampleEn2: Registration closes when seats are full.
words.exampleZh2: 名額額滿即停止報名。

words.exampleEn: The opening ceremony will feature a live band.
words.exampleZh: 開幕典禮將有現場樂團表演。
words.exampleEn2: The graduation ceremony starts at ten.
words.exampleZh2: 畢業典禮十點開始。

words.exampleEn: The store is celebrating its tenth anniversary.
words.exampleZh: 這家店正在慶祝十週年。
words.exampleEn2: They celebrated their 20th wedding anniversary.
words.exampleZh2: 他們慶祝結婚二十週年。

words.exampleEn: The charity fundraiser raised over $50,000.
words.exampleZh: 這場慈善募款活動募得超過五萬美元。
words.exampleEn2: The fundraiser featured a silent auction.
words.exampleZh2: 募款活動安排了無聲拍賣。

words.exampleEn: A welcome reception will follow the keynote speech.
words.exampleZh: 主題演講後將舉行歡迎酒會。
words.exampleEn2: The reception was held on the rooftop.
words.exampleZh2: 歡迎會在頂樓舉行。

words.exampleEn: Invitations were sent to all major clients.
words.exampleZh: 邀請函已寄給所有主要客戶。
words.exampleEn2: I received an invitation to the gala.
words.exampleZh2: 我收到了晚宴的邀請函。

words.exampleEn: Please RSVP by the end of next week.
words.exampleZh: 請於下週結束前回覆是否出席。
words.exampleEn2: Don't forget to RSVP for the dinner.
words.exampleZh2: 別忘了回覆晚宴的出席意願。

words.exampleEn: The full program is printed on the back of your ticket.
words.exampleZh: 完整節目表印在門票背面。
words.exampleEn2: The program includes two guest speakers.
words.exampleZh2: 節目表包含兩位特邀講者。

words.exampleEn: Light refreshments will be served during the break.
words.exampleZh: 休息時間將提供簡單茶點。
words.exampleEn2: Refreshments will be provided after the talk.
words.exampleZh2: 演講後將提供茶點。

words.exampleEn: Every attendee gets one free raffle ticket.
words.exampleZh: 每位出席者可獲得一張免費抽獎券。
words.exampleEn2: The raffle prize is a weekend hotel stay.
words.exampleZh2: 抽獎獎品是週末飯店住宿。

words.exampleEn: The award for best design goes to Ms. Liu.
words.exampleZh: 最佳設計獎頒給劉小姐。
words.exampleEn2: She has won the service award twice.
words.exampleZh2: 她兩度獲得服務獎。

words.exampleEn: Our company will host the regional conference this year.
words.exampleZh: 我們公司今年將主辦區域會議。
words.exampleEn2: Which city will host the games next year?
words.exampleZh2: 明年將由哪個城市主辦賽事？

words.exampleEn: Contact the organizer if you have dietary restrictions.
words.exampleZh: 如有飲食限制，請聯絡主辦單位。
words.exampleEn2: The organizers expect a record crowd.
words.exampleZh2: 主辦單位預期人數將創新高。

words.exampleEn: Volunteers put up decorations for the year-end party.
words.exampleZh: 志工們為尾牙布置了會場裝飾。
words.exampleEn2: The decorations matched the company colors.
words.exampleZh2: 裝飾配合了公司的代表色。

words.exampleEn: The speaker stepped up to the podium.
words.exampleZh: 講者走上講台。
words.exampleEn2: Notes are not allowed at the podium.
words.exampleZh2: 站上講台時不得攜帶小抄。

words.exampleEn: Please test the microphone before the session.
words.exampleZh: 開場前請先測試麥克風。
words.exampleEn2: The microphone stopped working mid-speech.
words.exampleZh2: 麥克風在演講到一半時故障了。

words.exampleEn: Pick up your name tag at the registration desk.
words.exampleZh: 請至報到櫃檯領取您的名牌。
words.exampleEn2: Write your table number on your name tag.
words.exampleZh2: 請在名牌上寫下你的桌號。

words.exampleEn: The seating chart is posted at the entrance.
words.exampleZh: 座位表張貼在入口處。
words.exampleEn2: The seating chart puts clients near the stage.
words.exampleZh2: 座位表把客戶安排在舞台附近。

words.exampleEn: A plaque was unveiled to commemorate the founder.
words.exampleZh: 為紀念創辦人，舉行了紀念牌揭幕儀式。
words.exampleEn2: A ceremony was held to commemorate the anniversary.
words.exampleZh2: 舉行了典禮以紀念週年。

words.exampleEn: The turnout exceeded our expectations.
words.exampleZh: 出席人數超出我們的預期。
words.exampleEn2: Rain reduced the turnout at the fair.
words.exampleZh2: 下雨使園遊會的出席人數減少。
